title: 关口表信息查询
sql: select (select name from ac_org where id=mp.org_no LIMIT 1) 单位名称, mp.mp_no 计量点编号, mp.mp_name 计量名称, (SELECT name from m_p_code cd where cd.code_type='mpSortCode' and cd.value=mp.type_code) 计量点分类, (case mp.status_code when '01' then '设立' when '02' then '在用' when '03' then '停用' when '04' then '撤销' else '其他' end) 计量点状态, line.line_name 线路, tq.tg_name 台区, (SELECT CONCAT_WS( '|', id, NAME ) FROM m_r_sect r WHERE r.id = mp.mr_sect_no ) 抄表段, me.made_no 出厂编号, me.t_factor 综合倍率, m_read.mr_read 示数, date_format(m_read.mr_date,'%Y-%m-%d') 最后抄表日期, ch.chkunit_name 考核单元名称, (SELECT name from m_p_code cd where cd.code_type='chkunitSort' and cd.value=ch.chkunit_type_code) 考核单元分类, (case iomp.io_id when '1' then '入口计量' when '0' then '出口计量' end) 计量点标志 from m_c_mp mp left join m_c_meter me on mp.id=me.mp_id left join m_c_meter_read m_read on me.id=m_read.meter_id and m_read.read_type_code='11' left join m_g_tg tq on tq.id=mp.tg_id left join m_g_line line on line.id=mp.line_id left join m_g_io_mp iomp on mp.id=iomp.mp_id left join m_g_chkunit ch on iomp.chkunit_id=ch.id where mp.org_no LIKE concat(5100102, '%') and mp.type_code in ('02') ORDER BY mp.org_no,line.line_name,tq.tg_name,mp.id,mp.status_code

title: 315及以上大用户信息查询
sql: select distinct o.name 供电所,cons.cons_no 用户编号,cons.cons_name 用户名称,p4.name 供电电压,用户电话,eprc.cat_prc_name 执行电价,xbsdl `线损（变损）电量`,tg.tg_name 台区名称,p1.name 公专变,concat(tran.id,'') 变压器标识,p6.name 变压器运行状态,cm.made_no 表计编号,mr11.mr_read 有功总示数,mr21.mr_read 无功总示数,cm.t_factor 倍率,p5.name 电表型号,p2.name 计量方式,p3.name 费控类型,contract_cap 合同容量,run_cap 运行容量,'' 计量装置运行情况,'' 接线情况,'' 铅封,'' 安全隐患,'' 其他问题,24年全年用电量,round(ifnull(24年全年总电费,0)/ifnull(24年全年用电量,0),2) 24年全年用户均价,24年基本电费 from m_c_cons cons join tmp_prc.xls_cons_cap315 xcons on xcons.cons_no=cons.cons_no join ac_org o on cons.org_no=o.id join tmp_prc.xls_org po on left(o.id,7)=po.id and po.id='5100120' join m_c_mp mp on cons.id=mp.cons_id and mp.type_code='01' and mp.status_code in ('01','02') join m_c_cons_prc cprc on mp.tariff_id=cprc.id join m_e_cat_prc eprc on cprc.prc_code=eprc.prc_code and po.id=eprc.org_no join m_e_bill_para_ver epara on eprc.para_vn=epara.id and epara.par_ver_type='1' and par_bgn_date<=now() and par_end_date>=now() and release_flag='1' left join m_c_meter_mp_rela cmmr on mp.id=cmmr.mp_id left join m_c_meter cm on cmmr.meter_id=cm.id

select (select name from ac_org where id=a.org_no) 单位,a.cons_no 户号,a.cons_name 户名,b.charge_ym 缴费月份,b.charge_date 缴费时间,b.rcv_amt 收费金额,c.prepay_amt 预收金额,d.this_rcved_amt 实收电费,d.this_penalty 实收违约金,d.rcvbl_ym 电费账期 from m_c_cons a join m_a_pay_flow b on a.cons_no=b.cons_no and charge_date>='2021-08-29 00:00:00' and charge_date<'2021-09-29 00:00:00' join m_a_prepay_flow c on b.id=c.charge_id left join m_a_rcved_flow d on b.id=d.charge_id where a.org_no like '5100120%' and ifnull(a.ctl_mode,'')<>'01' select (select name from ac_org where id=a.org_no) 单位,a.cons_no 户号,a.cons_name 户名,b.charge_ym 缴费月份,b.charge_date 缴费时间,b.rcv_amt 收费金额,c.prepay_amt 预收金额,d.this_rcved_amt 实收电费,d.this_penalty 实收违约金,d.rcvbl_ym 电费账期 from m_c_cons a join m_a_pay_flow b on a.cons_no=b.cons_no and charge_date>='2018-08-29 00:00:00' and charge_date<'2022-02-18 00:00:00' join m_a_prepay_flow c on b.id=c.charge_id left join m_a_rcved_flow d on b.id=d.charge_id where a.org_no like '5100120%' and ifnull(a.ctl_mode,'')<>'01' and a.cons_no in (012002000612,012002044198,)

title: 两保户查询
sql: select LEFT(a.ym,4) nf,count(DISTINCT a.cons_no),sum(b.t_amt) from m_e_cons_snap_arc a join ac_org o on a.org_no=o.id join m_e_cons_prc_amt_arc b on a.id=b.calc_id and b.amt_type='11' where a.org_no like '5100102%' and a.ym='202512' GROUP BY nf select LEFT(a.ym,4) nf,COUNT(distinct a.cons_no) 户数,sum(b.t_amt) 电费,sum(c.dl) 电量 from m_e_cons_snap_arc a join ac_org o on a.org_no=o.id join m_e_cons_prc_amt_arc b on a.id=b.calc_id and b.amt_type='11' left join (select prc_amt_id, sum(round(ifnull(cat_kwh_amt,0)/NULLIF(ifnull(cat_kwh_prc, 0), 0),0)) dl from m_e_kwh_amt_arc where ym between 202511 and 202512 group by prc_amt_id ) c on b.id=c.prc_amt_id where a.org_no like '5100102%' and a.ym between 202511 and 202512 GROUP BY a.ym select LEFT(a.ym,4) nf,a.cons_no 户号,b.t_amt 电费,c.dl 电量 from m_e_cons_snap_arc a join ac_org o on a.org_no=o.id join m_e_cons_prc_amt_arc b on a.id=b.calc_id and b.amt_type='11' left join (select prc_amt_id, sum(round(ifnull(cat_kwh_amt,0)/NULLIF(ifnull(cat_kwh_prc, 0), 0),0)) dl from m_e_kwh_amt_arc where ym='202501' group by prc_amt_id ) c on b.id=c.prc_amt_id where a.org_no like '5100102%' and a.ym='202501' GROUP BY a.cons_no,b.calc_id select o.name 单位,a.cons_no 户号,a.cons_name 户名,a.ym 账期,d.prc_code 电价编号,d.cat_prc_name 电价名称,p1.name 时段,round(ifnull(cat_kwh_amt,0)/ifnull(cat_kwh_prc,0),0) 电量,cat_kwh_prc 目录电度电价单价,cat_kwh_amt 目录电度电费金额,(ifnull(kwh_amt,0)-ifnull(cat_kwh_amt,0)) 代征电费 from m_e_cons_snap_arc a join ac_org o on a.org_no=o.id join m_e_cons_prc_amt_arc b on a.id=b.calc_id and b.amt_type='11' join m_e_kwh_amt_arc c on b.id=c.prc_amt_id join m_e_cat_prc d on b.prc_code=d.prc_code and b.para_vn=d.para_vn left join m_p_code p1 on p1.code_type='prcTsCode' and p1.value=c.prc_ts_code where a.org_no like concat(ifnull({单位},''),'%') and a.ym=ifnull({账期},'') and if(({户号} is null or {户号}=''),(1=1),a.cons_no={户号})

title: 全年电费

title: 全量算费原始版本
sql: select a.org_no 单位编码,o1.`name` 单位名称,a.mr_sect_no 抄表段编号,sect.`name` 抄表段名称 ,a.cons_no 用户编号,a.cons_name 用户名称,p20.`name` 用户状态,p28.name 费控类型,p22.`name` 用电分类,p23.`name` 用电类别 ,p25.`name` 行业分类,p4.`name` 供电电压,a.contract_cap 合同容量,a.run_cap 运行容量 ,p1.`name` 定价策略类型,p2.`name` 基本电费计算方式,e.dmd_spec_value 核定值,p3.`name` 功率因数考核方式 ,mp.mp_no 计量点编码,p21.`name` 计量点状态,p27.name '公专变',mgtg.tg_no '台区编码',mgtg.tg_name '台区名称',mgline.line_no '线路编码', mgline.line_name '线路名称',cm.made_no 表号,cm.t_factor 综合倍率,p17.`name` 参考表 ,ifnull((select '是' from m_r_coll_obj where meter_id=cm.id),'否') 是否采集 ,p9.`name` 计量方式,p10.`name` 计量点性质,p11.`name` 电量计算方式,mp.fqr_value 定量定比值 ,p12.`name` 变损分摊标识,p13.`name` 变损计费标识,p14.`name` 线损计算方式,p15.`name` 线损分摊标识,p16.`name` 线损计费标识 ,consprc.prc_code 电价码,catprc.cat_prc_name 电价名称,p24.`name` 电价用电类别,p26.`name` 电价行业分类 ,p6.`name` 执行水期,p7.`name` 执行峰谷,p8.`name` 力调标准 ,t.zsl 变压器总数,t.zrl 变压器总容量,t.zysl 在运变压器数量,t.zyrl 在运变压器容量,t.bsjsfs 在运变压器变损计算方式 ,left(a.build_date,10) 立户日期 from m_c_cons a join ac_org o1 on a.org_no=o1.id join m_c_sp c on a.id=c.cons_id join m_c_cons_prc_tactic e on c.id=e.sp_id join m_c_mp mp on c.id=mp.sp_id and mp.type_code='01' left join m_g_line mgline on mp.line_id=mgline.id left join m_g_tg mgtg on mp.tg_id=mgtg.id left join m_c_cons_prc consprc on mp.tariff_id=consprc.id left join m_e_cat_prc catprc on consprc.prc_code=catprc.prc_code and catprc.para_vn=f_get_curver_para_vn('1',@org_no) left join m_c_meter_mp_rela cmmr on mp.id=cmmr.mp_id left join m_c_meter cm on cmmr.meter_id=cm.id left join m_r_sect sect on a.mr_sect_no=sect.id left join ( select ta.cons_id,count(ta.id) zsl,sum(ta.plate_cap) zrl ,count(case when run_status_code='01' then ta.id end) zysl ,sum(case when run_status_code='01' then ta.plate_cap else 0 end) zyrl ,group_concat(distinct(case when run_status_code='01' then tp1.`name` else '' end)) bsjsfs from m_g_tran ta left join m_p_code tp1 on tp1.code_type='tlAlgCode' and tp1.`value`=ta.ts_alg_flag where ta.org_no like concat(@org_no,'%') and ta.cons_id is not null group by ta.cons_id ) t on a.id=t.cons_id left join m_p_code p1 on p1.code_type='prcTacticType' and p1.`value`=e.type_code left join m_p_code p2 on p2.code_type='baCalcMode' and p2.`value`=e.ba_calc_mode left join m_p_code p3 on p3.code_type='pfEvalMode' and p3.`value`=e.pf_eval_mode left join m_p_code p4 on p4.code_type='psVoltCode' and p4.`value`=a.volt_code left join m_p_code p6 on p6.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p6.`value`=consprc.fe_flag left join m_p_code p7 on p7.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p7.`value`=consprc.ts_flag left join m_p_code p8 on p8.code_type='pfStdCode' and p8.`value`=consprc.pf_std_code left join m_p_code p9 on p9.code_type='measMode' and p9.`value`=mp.meas_mode left join m_p_code p10 on p10.code_type='mpAttrCode' and p10.`value`=mp.mp_attr_code left join m_p_code p11 on p11.code_type='calcMode' and p11.`value`=mp.calc_mode left join m_p_code p12 on p12.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p12.`value`=mp.tl_share_flag left join m_p_code p13 on p13.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p13.`value`=mp.tl_bill_flag left join m_p_code p14 on p14.code_type='llCalcMode' and p14.`value`=mp.ll_calc_mode left join m_p_code p15 on p15.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p15.`value`=mp.ll_share_flag left join m_p_code p16 on p16.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p16.`value`=mp.ll_bill_flag left join m_p_code p17 on p17.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p17.`value`=cm.ref_meter_flag left join m_p_code p20 on p20.code_type='statusCode' and p20.`value`=a.status_code left join m_p_code p21 on p21.code_type='mpStatus' and p21.`value`=mp.status_code left join m_p_code p22 on p22.code_type='custSortCode' and p22.`value`=a.cons_sort_code left join m_p_code p23 on p23.code_type='elecTypeCode' and p23.`value`=a.elec_type_code left join m_p_code p24 on p24.code_type='elecTypeCode' and p24.`value`=consprc.elec_type_code left join m_p_code p25 on p25.code_type='tradeCode' and p25.`value`=a.trade_code left join m_p_code p26 on p26.code_type='tradeCode' and p26.`value`=consprc.trade_code left join m_p_code p27 on p27.code_type='pubPrivFlag' and p27.value=mgtg.pub_priv_flag left join m_p_code p28 on p28.code_type='ctlMode' and p28.value=a.ctl_mode left join m_p_code p29 on p29.code_type='readTypeCode' and p29.value=re.read_type_code where a.org_no like concat(@org_no,'%') and a.status_code<>'9' order by a.org_no

title: 分布式共用信息查询
sql: select a.org_no 单位编号,o.`name` 管理单位,a.gc_no 发电用户编号,a.gc_name 发电用户名称,p1.`name` 发电用户状态 ,concat(date_format(a.gc_date,'%Y-%m-%d'),'') 首次并网日期 ,p7.`name` 发电量消纳方式,p8.`name` 业主分类 ,y.pro_no 项目编号,y.pro_app_doc 项目批复文号,a.gc_addr 发电地址 ,ln.line_no 线路编码,ln.line_name 线路名称,tg.tg_no 台区编号,tg.tg_name 台区名称,tg.tg_cap 台区容量,a.mr_sect_no 抄表段编码,rs.`name` 抄表段名称 ,a.contract_cap 合同容量,p2.`name` 发电用户类型,p3.`name` 客户类别,p4.`name` 发电方式,p5.`name` 并网电压,p6.`name` 行业分类 ,mp.mp_no 上网关口计量点,cm.made_no 上网关口表号,cons.cons_no 共用用户编号,cons_name 共用用户名称,cons.mr_sect_no 用户抄表段,sect.name 抄表段名称 from m_c_fc_gc a join ac_org o on a.org_no=o.id left join m_c_fc_proinfo_gc_rela x on x.gc_id=a.id left join m_c_fc_proinfo y on x.proinfo_id=y.id left join m_r_sect rs on a.mr_sect_no=rs.id left join m_c_fc_gn b on a.id=b.gc_id left join m_c_fc_gn_mp_rela gmr on b.id=gmr.gn_id left join m_c_mp mp on gmr.mp_id=mp.id left join m_c_meter_mp_rela mmr on mp.id=mmr.mp_id left join m_c_meter cm on mmr.meter_id=cm.id left join m_c_cons cons on cm.cons_id=cons.id left join m_g_line ln on b.line_id=ln.id left join m_g_tg tg on b.tg_id=tg.id left join m_r_sect sect on cons.mr_sect_no=sect.id left join m_p_code p1 on p1.code_type='gcStatusCode' and p1.`value`=a.status_code left join m_p_code p2 on p2.code_type='gcSortCodeType' and p2.`value`=a.gc_sort_code left join m_p_code p3 on p3.code_type='gcType' and p3.`value`=a.gc_type left join m_p_code p4 on p4.code_type='gcTypeCode' and p4.`value`=a.elec_gener_type left join m_p_code p5 on p5.code_type='psVoltCode' and p5.`value`=a.volt_code left join m_p_code p6 on p6.code_type='tradeCode' and p6.`value`=a.trade_code left join m_p_code p7 on p7.code_type='absoMode' and p7.`value`=a.abso_mode left join m_p_code p8 on p8.code_type='ownerClassify' and p8.`value`=a.owner_classify where a.org_no like '5100102%' and a.fc_cust_type='2' order by a.org_no,a.gc_no

title: 发供一体（供电）公司生产经营情况报表_新
sql: SELECT round(sum(IF(p.usage_type_code = '1101',q.settle_apq,0))/10000,2) as '2:自有电站总发电量(含厂用电量）', if(round((sum(IF(p.usage_type_code = '1101',q.settle_apq,0))-sum(IF(p.usage_type_code = '1102',q.settle_apq,0)))/10000,2) < 0,0,round((sum(IF(p.usage_type_code = '1101',q.settle_apq,0))-sum(IF(p.usage_type_code = '1102',q.settle_apq,0)))/10000,2)) as'3:自有电站厂用电量' FROM m_e_gc_snap_arc a inner JOIN m_c_fc_gc c ON a.gc_id = c.id AND c.manage_agency = '01' INNER JOIN m_e_mp_para_snap_arc p ON p.calc_id = a.id INNER JOIN m_e_mp_pq_arc q ON p.id = q.mp_para_snap_id where a.ym = '202602' and a.fc_cust_type = '3' and a.org_no in (SELECT a.id FROM ac_org a WHERE a.id_path LIKE ( SELECT CONCAT(ao.id_path, '%') FROM ac_org ao WHERE ao.id = '5100118' ) AND a.type = 0 AND a.level = 3) select round(ifnull(SUM(IFNULL(amt.t_cat_kwh_amt, 0)), 0)/ 10000, 2) as '26:（2）购光伏' from m_e_gc_snap_arc a inner join m_c_fc_gc c on a.gc_id = c.id inner join ( select p.calc_id, sum(p.t_cat_kwh_amt) t_cat_kwh_amt from m_e_gc_snap_arc q left join m_e_cons_prc_amt_arc p on p.calc_id = q.id where q.org_no in (select a.id from ac_org a where a.id_path like (select CONCAT(ao.id_path, '%') from ac_org ao where ao.id = '5100118' ) and a.type = 0 and a.level = 3) and q.ym = '202602' group by q.id ) amt on amt.calc_id = a.id inner join ( select p.calc_id, sum(q.settle_apq) settle_apq from m_e_mp_pq_arc q left join m_e_mp_para_snap_arc p on p.id = q.mp_para_snap_id and p.usage_type_code = '1102' where p.org_no in (select a.id from ac_org a where a.id_path like (select CONCAT(ao.id_path, '%') from ac_org ao where ao.id = '5100118' ) and a.type = 0 and a.level = 3) and p.ym = '202602' group by p.calc_id ) mp on mp.calc_id = a.id where a.ym = '202602' and a.fc_cust_type = '2' and a.org_no in (select a.id from ac_org a where a.id_path like (select CONCAT(ao.id_path, '%') from ac_org ao where ao.id = '5100118' ) and a.type = 0 and a.level = 3) and c.elec_gener_type='04' group by c.elec_gener_type SELECT round(ifnull(SUM(if(b.amt_type='200' or b.amt_type='201',IFNULL(b.T_AMT, 0),0)),0)/10000,2) as '33:1.购国网' FROM m_e_gc_snap_arc a INNER JOIN m_e_cons_prc_amt_arc b ON a.ID = b.CALC_ID inner JOIN m_c_fc_gc c ON a.gc_id = c.id AND c.manage_agency = '03' where a.ym = '202602' and a.fc_cust_type = '3' and a.org_no in (SELECT a.id FROM ac_org a WHERE a.id_path LIKE ( SELECT CONCAT(ao.id_path, '%') FROM ac_org ao WHERE ao.id = '5100118' ) AND a.type = 0 AND a.level = 3)
keywords: 2:自有电站总发电量(含厂用电量）

title: 发供一体（供电）公司生产经营情况报表_新
sql: SELECT deal_obj, round(ifnull(sum(t_amt),0)/10000,2) as '36:4.县间交易', round(ifnull(sum(bulkpur_pq),0)/10000,2) as '19:4.县间交易' FROM m_e_bulkpur_pq WHERE deal_ym ='202602' and org_no in (SELECT a.id FROM ac_org a WHERE a.id_path LIKE ( SELECT CONCAT(ao.id_path, '%') FROM ac_org ao WHERE ao.id = '5100118' ) AND a.type = 0) and deal_obj='2' GROUP BY deal_obj

title: 发电用户信息查询
sql: select a.org_no 单位编号,o.`name` 单位名称,a.gc_no 发电用户编号,a.gc_name 发电用户名称 ,a.ym 月份,a.contract_cap 合同容量,p1.`name` 发电量消纳方式 ,b.t_gra_pq 发电量,t1.made_no 表号,t1.t_factor 综合倍率,t1.read_type_name 示数类型,t1.last_mr_num 起度,t1.this_read 止度 ,b.t_pur_pq 上网电量,b.self_pq 自用电量,b.pay_amt 应付金额,b.pay_pur_amt 结算电费,b.pay_gra_amt 补贴电费 ,(b.paied_pur_amt+b.paied_gra_amt) 实付金额,b.paied_pur_amt 实付结算电费,b.paied_gra_amt 实付补贴电费,b.owe_amt 欠费金额 ,p2.`name` 结清标志,date_format(a.send_date,'%Y%m%d') 发行日期 from m_e_gc_snap_arc a join m_a_fs_pay_info b on a.id=b.calc_id left join ( select a.id calc_id,a.org_no,a.gc_no,a.gc_name,a.ym,c.mp_id,c.usage_type_code ,d.meter_id,d.made_no,d.t_factor,d.read_type_code,p1.`name` read_type_name,d.last_mr_num,d.this_read,d.src_code from m_e_gc_snap_arc a join m_e_consprc_tactic_snap_arc b on a.id=b.calc_id join m_e_mp_para_snap_arc c on b.id=c.prc_tactic_snap_id and c.usage_type_code='1102'

title: 发行电量排名
sql: select a.org_no 单位编码,o.`name` 单位名称,a.cons_no 户号,a.cons_name 户名 ,sum(b.t_settle_pq) 总电量,sum(t_amt) 总电费 from m_e_cons_snap_arc a join m_e_cons_prc_amt_arc b on a.id=b.calc_id join ac_org o on a.org_no=o.id where a.org_no like concat(510010233,'%') and a.ym BETWEEN {开始年月} AND {截止年月} group by a.cons_no ORDER BY `电量` DESC LIMIT 100 综合查询用电量前100名 select distinct o.name 供电单位,cons.cons_no 用户编号,cons.cons_name 用户名称,p2.name 用户状态,p1.name 用电类别,p3.name 供电电压, left(cons.build_date,10) 立户日期, 202601电量,202601电费,202602电量,202602电费,ROUND((202602电量-202601电量)/202602电量*100,2) 本月电量对比上月浮动百分比 from m_c_cons cons join ac_org o on cons.org_no=o.id and o.id like '510010233%'

title: 发行行业类别信息查询
sql: select a.org_no 单位编码,o.`name` 单位名称,a.cons_no 户号,a.cons_name 户名 ,a.trade_type_code 行业编码,p1.`name` 行业名称 ,b.prc_code 电价编码,c.cat_prc_name 电价名称 ,sum(b.t_settle_pq) 电量,sum(t_amt) 电费 from m_e_cons_snap_arc a join m_e_cons_prc_amt_arc b on a.id=b.calc_id join ac_org o on a.org_no=o.id left join m_e_cat_prc c on b.para_vn=c.para_vn and b.prc_code=c.prc_code left join m_p_code p1 on p1.code_type='tradeCode' and p1.`value`=a.trade_type_code where a.org_no like '5100150%' and a.ym=202312 group by a.cons_no,b.prc_code

title: 变压器状态及停用启用时间查询
sql: select a.org_no 单位编码,o1.`name` 单位名称,a.mr_sect_no 抄表段编号,sect.`name` 抄表段名称 ,a.cons_no 用户编号,a.cons_name 用户名称,p20.`name` 用户状态,p22.`name` 用电分类,p23.`name` 用电类别 ,p25.`name` 行业分类,p4.`name` 供电电压,a.contract_cap 合同容量,a.run_cap 运行容量 ,p1.`name` 定价策略类型,p2.`name` 基本电费计算方式,e.dmd_spec_value 核定值,p3.`name` 功率因数考核方式 ,mp.mp_no 计量点编码,p21.`name` 计量点状态,cm.made_no 表号,cm.t_factor 综合倍率,p17.`name` 参考表 ,ifnull((select '是' from m_r_coll_obj where meter_id=cm.id),'否') 是否采集 ,p9.`name` 计量方式,p10.`name` 计量点性质,p11.`name` 电量计算方式,mp.fqr_value 定量定比值 ,p12.`name` 变损分摊标识,p13.`name` 变损计费标识,p14.`name` 线损计算方式,p15.`name` 线损分摊标识,p16.`name` 线损计费标识 ,consprc.prc_code 电价码,catprc.cat_prc_name 电价名称,p24.`name` 电价用电类别,p26.`name` 电价行业分类 ,p6.`name` 执行水期,p7.`name` 执行峰谷,p8.`name` 力调标准 ,t.id 变压器标识,t.tran_name 变压器名称,t.chg_remark 变压器状态,t.plate_cap 变压器容量,t.actual_start_date 实际启用时间,t.actual_stop_use_date 实际停用时间,t.plan_resume_date 设备恢复时间 ,left(a.build_date,10) 立户日期 from m_c_cons a join ac_org o1 on a.org_no=o1.id join m_c_sp c on a.id=c.cons_id join m_c_cons_prc_tactic e on c.id=e.sp_id join m_c_mp mp on c.id=mp.sp_id and mp.type_code='01' left join m_c_cons_prc consprc on mp.tariff_id=consprc.id left join m_e_cat_prc catprc on consprc.prc_code=catprc.prc_code and catprc.para_vn=f_get_curver_para_vn('1',@org_no) left join m_c_meter_mp_rela cmmr on mp.id=cmmr.mp_id left join m_c_meter cm on cmmr.meter_id=cm.id left join m_r_sect sect on a.mr_sect_no=sect.id left join m_g_tran t on a.id=t.cons_id left join m_p_code p1 on p1.code_type='prcTacticType' and p1.`value`=e.type_code left join m_p_code p2 on p2.code_type='baCalcMode' and p2.`value`=e.ba_calc_mode left join m_p_code p3 on p3.code_type='pfEvalMode' and p3.`value`=e.pf_eval_mode left join m_p_code p4 on p4.code_type='psVoltCode' and p4.`value`=a.volt_code left join m_p_code p6 on p6.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p6.`value`=consprc.fe_flag left join m_p_code p7 on p7.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p7.`value`=consprc.ts_flag left join m_p_code p8 on p8.code_type='pfStdCode' and p8.`value`=consprc.pf_std_code left join m_p_code p9 on p9.code_type='measMode' and p9.`value`=mp.meas_mode left join m_p_code p10 on p10.code_type='mpAttrCode' and p10.`value`=mp.mp_attr_code left join m_p_code p11 on p11.code_type='calcMode' and p11.`value`=mp.calc_mode left join m_p_code p12 on p12.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p12.`value`=mp.tl_share_flag left join m_p_code p13 on p13.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p13.`value`=mp.tl_bill_flag left join m_p_code p14 on p14.code_type='llCalcMode' and p14.`value`=mp.ll_calc_mode left join m_p_code p15 on p15.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p15.`value`=mp.ll_share_flag left join m_p_code p16 on p16.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p16.`value`=mp.ll_bill_flag left join m_p_code p17 on p17.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p17.`value`=cm.ref_meter_flag left join m_p_code p20 on p20.code_type='statusCode' and p20.`value`=a.status_code left join m_p_code p21 on p21.code_type='mpStatus' and p21.`value`=mp.status_code left join m_p_code p22 on p22.code_type='custSortCode' and p22.`value`=a.cons_sort_code left join m_p_code p23 on p23.code_type='elecTypeCode' and p23.`value`=a.elec_type_code left join m_p_code p24 on p24.code_type='elecTypeCode' and p24.`value`=consprc.elec_type_code left join m_p_code p25 on p25.code_type='tradeCode' and p25.`value`=a.trade_code left join m_p_code p26 on p26.code_type='tradeCode' and p26.`value`=consprc.trade_code where a.org_no like concat(@org_no,'%') and a.status_code<>'9' and mp.status_code in('01','02') and a.contract_cap>=315 order by a.org_no

title: 城农网标志
sql: select ac.name 供电单位,cons.cons_no 户号,cons.cons_name 户名,p1.name 城农网标志,p2.name 票据类型 from m_c_cons cons join ac_org ac on ac.id=cons.org_no left join m_p_code p1 on p1.code_type='ruralConsCode' and p1.`value`=cons.rural_cons_code left join m_p_code p2 on p2.code_type='notetypecode' and p2.`value`=cons.note_type_code where cons.org_no like '5100102%' and cons.status_code<>'9'

title: 大小发票打印查询
sql: SELECT * FROM m_a_rcvbl_flow flow WHERE flow.cons_no = '010218316022' AND rcvbl_ym = '202601' AND EXISTS (select 1 from m_a_inv inv where inv.rcvbl_amt_id = flow.id and inv.note_use_state ='01' AND inv.note_type_code in('0101','0102'))

title: 大小发票打印查询
sql: SELECT * FROM m_a_rcvbl_flow_arc flow WHERE flow.cons_no = '010218316022' AND rcvbl_ym = '202601' AND EXISTS (select 1 from m_a_inv inv where inv.rcvbl_amt_id = flow.id and inv.note_use_state ='01' AND inv.note_type_code in('0101','0102'))

title: 大小发票打印查询
sql: SELECT * FROM m_a_inv where rcvbl_amt_id='1551000076621737'

title: 市场化业扩推送查询
sql: select o1.`name` 管理单位,a.cons_no 用户编号,a.cons_name 用户名称,ms.app_no 流程编号,ms.create_time 推送时间,p1.name 业务类型, (case ms.status when '1' then '成功' else '失败' end) 推送状态,ms.req_content 推送内容 from m_c_cons a join ac_org o1 on a.org_no=o1.id join m_s_market_push_log ms on ms.cons_id=a.id left join m_s_app_arc app on app.app_no=ms.app_no left join m_p_code p1 on p1.value=app.app_type_code and p1.code_type='meterIrProcess' where a.org_no like concat(@org_no,'%') order by a.org_no

title: 市场化标识字段
sql: select * from m_c_cons WHERE cons_no ="010225024179"

title: 当前档案及电表示数
sql: select o.name 供电单位,a.cons_no 户号,a.cons_name 户名,p3.name 公专变,p1.name 费控类型,sect.id 抄表段号,sect.name 抄表段名字,tg.tg_no 台区编号,tg.tg_name 台区名字,p2.name 定价策略,eprc.cat_prc_name 电价名称,eprc.prc_code 电价编号,cat_kwh_prc 目录单价,b.mp_no 计量点,c.made_no 表号,总,尖,峰,谷 from m_c_cons a join ac_org o on a.org_no=o.id and o.id like '5100434%' join m_c_mp b on a.id=b.cons_id and b.type_code='01' and b.status_code in ('01','02') join m_c_cons_prc cprc on b.tariff_id=cprc.id and a.id=cprc.cons_id join m_e_cat_prc eprc on cprc.prc_code=eprc.prc_code and eprc.para_vn=f_get_curver_para_vn(1, '5100434') join m_e_cat_prc_det eprcdet on eprc.id=eprcdet.cat_prc_id and range_type_code in ('13','31-13') and prc_ti_code='03' left join m_c_meter c on a.id=c.cons_id and b.id=c.mp_id left join (select meter_id,mp_id ,max(ifnull((case read_type_code when '11' then mr_read end),'')) 总 ,max(ifnull((case read_type_code when '12' then mr_read end),'')) 尖 ,max(ifnull((case read_type_code when '13' then mr_read end),'')) 峰 ,max(ifnull((case read_type_code when '14' then mr_read end),'')) 谷 from m_c_meter_read group by meter_id,mp_id ) d on c.id=d.meter_id and b.id=d.mp_id left join m_g_tg tg on tg.id=left(b.tg_id,0) left join m_r_sect sect on a.mr_sect_no=sect.id left join m_c_cons_prc_tactic prct on a.id=prct.cons_id and prct.sp_id=b.sp_id left join m_p_code p3 on p3.code_type='pubprivflag' and p3.value=ifnull(tg.pub_priv_flag,'01') left join m_p_code p1 on p1.code_type='ctlmode' and p1.value=a.ctl_mode left join m_p_code p2 on p2.code_type='prcTacticType' and p2.value=prct.type_code where a.status_code in ('0','1','2','3') order by 1,2

title: 当前欠费信息查询
sql: SELECT ac.name 供电所,cons.cons_no 户号,cons.cons_name 户名,bal.prepay_bal 钱包余额,SUM(m.rcvbl_amt-m.rcved_amt) 电费欠费,SUM(m.rcvbl_penalty-m.rcved_penalty) 欠违约金,SUM((m.rcvbl_amt-m.rcved_amt)+(m.rcvbl_penalty-m.rcved_penalty)) 总欠费 FROM `m_c_cons` cons join ac_org ac on ac.id=cons.org_no LEFT JOIN `m_a_rcvbl_flow` m ON cons.cons_no=m.cons_no LEFT JOIN m_a_acct_bal bal ON bal.cons_no=m.cons_no WHERE cons.cons_no IN('010217000007') GROUP BY m.cons_no

title: 当前欠费及余额
sql: SELECT a.`name` 供电所,m.cons_no 户号,bal.prepay_bal 钱包余额,SUM(m.rcvbl_amt-m.rcved_amt) 电费欠费,SUM(m.rcvbl_penalty-m.rcved_penalty) 欠违约金,SUM((m.rcvbl_amt-m.rcved_amt)+(m.rcvbl_penalty-m.rcved_penalty)) 总欠费 FROM `m_a_rcvbl_flow` m JOIN ac_org a ON m.org_no=a.id join m_a_acct_bal bal ON bal.cons_no=m.cons_no WHERE m.cons_no IN() GROUP BY m.cons_no

title: 快照2-7月算费电价是否一致
sql: SELECT 单位编码, 单位名称, 户号, 户名, `2月电价`, `3月电价`, `4月电价`, `5月电价`, `6月电价`, `7月电价`, CASE WHEN base IS NULL THEN '一致'

title: 总欠费冻结信息查询
sql: SELECT a.orgname '县公司',a.`name` '供电所',a.cons_name '用户名称',a.cons_no '用户编号',a.rcvbl_ym '应收年月',a.rcvbl_amt '应收电费',a.rcved_amt '实收电费',a.qf '欠费' FROM ( SELECT c.cons_no, c.cons_name, o.`name`, o1.`name` orgname, a.rcvbl_ym, ifnull(a.rcvbl_amt,0) rcvbl_amt, ifnull(a.rcved_amt,0) y_rcved_amt, ifnull(sum(b.this_rcved_amt),0) this_rcved_amt, ifnull(a.rcved_amt,0)-ifnull(sum(b.this_rcved_amt),0) rcved_amt, ifnull(a.rcvbl_amt,0) - ifnull(a.rcved_amt,0) +ifnull(sum(b.this_rcved_amt),0) qf FROM m_a_rcvbl_flow a left JOIN m_a_rcved_flow b ON a.id = b.rcvbl_amt_id and b.create_time >'2026-04-10 00:00:00' LEFT JOIN m_c_cons c on c.cons_no = a.cons_no left join ac_org o on c.org_no = o.id left join ac_org o1 on left(c.org_no,7) = o1.id WHERE a.rcvbl_ym <= 202603 and a.org_no LIKE concat(5100102,'%') GROUP BY a.id UNION ALL SELECT c.cons_no, c.cons_name, o.`name`, o1.`name` orgname, a.rcvbl_ym, ifnull(a.rcvbl_amt,0) rcvbl_amt, ifnull(a.rcved_amt,0) y_rcved_amt, ifnull(sum(b.this_rcved_amt),0) this_rcved_amt, ifnull(a.rcved_amt,0)-ifnull(sum(b.this_rcved_amt),0) rcved_amt, ifnull(a.rcvbl_amt,0) - ifnull(a.rcved_amt,0) +ifnull(sum(b.this_rcved_amt),0) qf FROM m_a_rcvbl_flow_arc a left JOIN m_a_rcved_flow b ON a.id = b.rcvbl_amt_id and b.create_time >'2026-04-10 00:00:00' LEFT JOIN m_c_cons c on c.cons_no = a.cons_no left join ac_org o on c.org_no = o.id left join ac_org o1 on left(c.org_no,7) = o1.id WHERE a.create_time >'2026-04-10 00:00:00' and a.rcvbl_ym <= 202603 and a.org_no LIKE concat(5100102,'%') GROUP BY a.id ) a WHERE a.qf > 0

title: 抄表方式查询
sql: select (select name from ac_org where id=a.org_no limit 1) 单位名称, a.cons_no 用户编号, a.cons_name 用户名称, p1.`name` 用户分类, a.elec_addr 用电地址, b.mp_id 计量点编号, p2.`name` 计量点分类, b.made_no 出厂编号, date_format(b.this_ymd,'%Y-%m-%d') 抄表日期, (select name from m_p_code m where m.code_type ='readTypeCode' and m.value=b.read_type_code limit 1) 示数类型, b.last_mr_num 上次示数, b.this_read 本次示数, b.t_factor 综合倍率, b.last_mr_pq 上次抄见电量, b.this_read_pq 本次抄见电量, (select name from m_p_code cd where cd.code_type='mrModeCode' and cd.value=b.actual_mode limit 1) 抄表方式, (select name from m_p_code cd where cd.code_type='mrStatusCode' and value=b.mr_status_code limit 1) 抄表状态, tq.tg_name 台区名称, line.line_name 线路名称, a.mr_sect_no 抄表段编号, (select name from m_r_sect where id=a.mr_sect_no limit 1) 抄表段名称 from m_e_cons_snap_arc a join m_r_data_arc b on a.id=b.calc_id left join m_c_mp c on c.id=b.mp_id left join m_g_tg tq on tq.id=c.tg_id left join m_g_line line on line.id=c.line_id left join m_p_code p1 on p1.code_type='custSortCode' and p1.`value`=a.cons_sort_code left join m_p_code p2 on p2.code_type='mpSortCode' and p2.`value`=c.type_code where a.org_no like concat({组织}, '%') and a.ym={电费年月} and exists (select 1 from m_r_plan_arc where app_no=a.app_code and plan_status='10') and b.made_no is not null and if(({抄表方式} is null or {抄表方式}=''),(1=1),(b.actual_mode={抄表方式})) and if(({抄表段编号} is null or {抄表段编号}=''),(1=1),(a.mr_sect_no={抄表段编号})) and if(({台区名称} is null or {台区名称}=''),(1=1),(tq.tg_name LIKE concat('%',{台区名称}, '%'))) and if(({线路名称} is null or {线路名称}=''),(1=1),(line.line_name LIKE concat('%',{线路名称}, '%'))) and if(({户名} is null or {户名}=''),(1=1),a.cons_name like CONCAT('%',{户名},'%')) and if(({户号} is null or {户号}=''),(1=1),a.cons_no like CONCAT('%',{户号},'%')) and if(({抄表状态} is null or {抄表状态}=''),(1=1),(b.mr_status_code={抄表状态})) and if(({用户分类} is null or {用户分类}=''),(1=1),(a.cons_sort_code={用户分类})) and if(({计量点分类} is null or {计量点分类}=''),(1=1),(c.type_code={计量点分类})) order by a.org_no,a.cons_no,a.cons_name

title: 收费明细查询
sql: SELECT pf.cons_no 户号, g.cons_name 户名, m.tg_name 台区名称, h.id 抄表段编号, h.name 抄表段名称, (SELECT `name` FROM ac_org WHERE `code` = pf.dept_no) 收款单位, ( SELECT `name` FROM ac_org WHERE `code` = pf.org_no ) 管理单位, ( SELECT `name` FROM ac_org WHERE `code` = pf.rcv_org_no ) 收款部门, us.user_name 收费员, left(pf.charge_date,10) 收费日期, pf.bank_date 银行日期, pf.charge_date 收费时间, p1.name 收费类型, p2.name 结算方式, p3.name 缴费方式, IFNULL( pf.rcv_amt,0) 收费金额, d.this_rcved_amt 实收电费, d.this_penalty 实收违约金, c.prepay_amt 预收金额, ( CASE WHEN p.id IS NULL THEN '后付费' ELSE '预付费' END ) AS 收费类别 FROM m_a_pay_flow pf left join m_a_prepay_flow c on pf.id=c.charge_id left join (select f.charge_id charge_id,sum(f.this_rcved_amt) this_rcved_amt,sum(f.this_penalty)this_penalty from m_a_rcved_flow f where f.org_no like'5100102%' and f.rcved_date between '2026-01-03' and '2026-02-13' GROUP BY f.charge_id )d on pf.id=d.charge_id LEFT JOIN m_c_cons g ON pf.cons_no = g.cons_no LEFT JOIN m_r_sect h ON g.mr_sect_no = h.id LEFT JOIN m_c_mp k ON k.cons_id = g.id LEFT JOIN m_g_tg m ON k.tg_id = m.id LEFT JOIN m_a_pc_tran t ON t.charge_id = pf.id LEFT JOIN m_ps_purchase p ON p.chargeNo = t.bank_serial LEFT JOIN ac_user us on pf.charge_emp_no=us.id left join m_p_code p1 on p1.code_type='chargeType' and p1.`value`=pf.type_code left join m_p_code p2 on p2.code_type='settleMode' and p2.`value`=pf.settle_mode left join m_p_code p3 on p3.code_type='payMode' and p3.`value`=pf.pay_mode WHERE pf.org_no IN ( SELECT a.id FROM ac_org a WHERE a.id_path LIKE ( SELECT CONCAT( id_path, '%' ) FROM ac_org WHERE id = '5100102' )

title: 新能源当前档案信息查询
sql: select a.org_no 单位编号,o.`name` 管理单位,a.gc_no 发电用户编号,a.gc_name 发电用户名称,p1.`name` 发电用户状态 ,concat(date_format(a.gc_date,'%Y-%m-%d'),'') 首次并网日期 ,p7.`name` 发电量消纳方式,p8.`name` 业主分类 ,y.pro_no 项目编号,y.pro_app_doc 项目批复文号,a.gc_addr 发电地址 ,ln.line_no 线路编码,ln.line_name 线路名称 ,tg.tg_no 台区编号,tg.tg_name 台区名称,tg.tg_cap 台区容量,a.mr_sect_no 抄表段编码,rs.`name` 抄表段名称 ,a.contract_cap 合同容量,p2.`name` 发电用户类型,p3.`name` 客户类别,p4.`name` 发电方式,p5.`name` 并网电压,p6.`name` 行业分类 ,mp.mp_no 上网关口计量点,cm.made_no 上网关口表号,总,cons.cons_no 共用用户编号,cons_name 共用用户名称 from m_c_fc_gc a join ac_org o on a.org_no=o.id left join m_c_fc_proinfo_gc_rela x on x.gc_id=a.id left join m_c_fc_proinfo y on x.proinfo_id=y.id left join m_r_sect rs on a.mr_sect_no=rs.id left join m_c_mp mp on mp.cons_id=a.id left join m_c_meter_mp_rela mmr on mp.id=mmr.mp_id left join m_c_meter cm on mmr.meter_id=cm.id and mp.id=cm.mp_id left join (select meter_id,mp_id ,max(ifnull((case read_type_code when '11' then mr_read end),'')) 总 ,max(ifnull((case read_type_code when '12' then mr_read end),'')) 尖 ,max(ifnull((case read_type_code when '13' then mr_read end),'')) 峰 ,max(ifnull((case read_type_code when '14' then mr_read end),'')) 谷 from m_c_meter_read group by meter_id,mp_id ) d on cm.id=d.meter_id and mp.id=d.mp_id left join m_c_cons cons on cm.cons_id=cons.id left join m_g_line ln on mp.line_id=ln.id left join m_g_tg tg on mp.tg_id=tg.id left join m_p_code p1 on p1.code_type='gcStatusCode' and p1.`value`=a.status_code left join m_p_code p2 on p2.code_type='gcSortCodeType' and p2.`value`=a.gc_sort_code left join m_p_code p3 on p3.code_type='gcType' and p3.`value`=a.gc_type left join m_p_code p4 on p4.code_type='gcTypeCode' and p4.`value`=a.elec_gener_type left join m_p_code p5 on p5.code_type='psVoltCode' and p5.`value`=a.volt_code left join m_p_code p6 on p6.code_type='tradeCode' and p6.`value`=a.trade_code left join m_p_code p7 on p7.code_type='absoMode' and p7.`value`=a.abso_mode left join m_p_code p8 on p8.code_type='ownerClassify' and p8.`value`=a.owner_classify where a.org_no like concat('5100102','%') and a.gc_no='010217359460'

title: 新能源项目机制信息查询
sql: select (SELECT name from ac_org WHERE id=LEFT(a.org_no,7)) 县公司,a.org_no 单位编号,o.`name` 管理单位,a.gc_no 发电用户编号,a.gc_name 发电用户名称,p1.`name` 发电用户状态 ,concat(date_format(a.gc_date,'%Y-%m-%d'),'') 首次并网日期 ,p2.`name` 发电量消纳方式 ,y.id 项目id,y.pro_no 项目编号,y.prj_name 项目名称,y.pro_fili_no 项目备案文号,y.pro_app_doc 项目批复文号,y.investor 项目投资方,a.gc_addr 发电地址,p3.`name` 项目类别,ms.mechanism_pq 机制电量,ms.mechanism_prc 机制电价,ms.execute_year 执行年限,p4.name 执行开始时间类别,ms.start_time 执行开始时间,ms.end_time 执行终止时间,p5.name 执行终止时间类别, 1月,2月,3月,4月,5月,6月,7月,8月,9月,10月,11月,12月 from m_c_fc_gc a join ac_org o on a.org_no=o.id left join m_c_fc_proinfo_gc_rela x on x.gc_id=a.id left join m_c_fc_proinfo y on x.proinfo_id=y.id left join m_r_sect rs on a.mr_sect_no=rs.id left JOIN m_c_fc_mechanism ms on a.id=ms.gc_id left join( SELECT mechanism_id, sum(case when amt_ym=202601 then mechanism_pq end) 1月 ,sum(case when amt_ym=202602 then mechanism_pq end) 2月 ,sum(case when amt_ym=202603 then mechanism_pq end) 3月 ,sum(case when amt_ym=202604 then mechanism_pq end) 4月 ,sum(case when amt_ym=202605 then mechanism_pq end) 5月 ,sum(case when amt_ym=202606 then mechanism_pq end) 6月 ,sum(case when amt_ym=202607 then mechanism_pq end) 7月 ,sum(case when amt_ym=202608 then mechanism_pq end) 8月 ,sum(case when amt_ym=202609 then mechanism_pq end) 9月 ,sum(case when amt_ym=202610 then mechanism_pq end) 10月 ,sum(case when amt_ym=202611 then mechanism_pq end) 11月 ,sum(case when amt_ym=202612 then mechanism_pq end) 12月 FROM m_c_fc_mechanism_det GROUP BY mechanism_id ) det on det.mechanism_id=ms.id left join m_p_code p1 on p1.code_type='gcStatusCode' and p1.`value`=a.status_code left join m_p_code p2 on p2.code_type='absoMode' and p2.`value`=a.abso_mode left join m_p_code p3 on p3.code_type='prosort' and p3.value=ms.pro_sort left join m_p_code p4 on p4.code_type='startTimeType' and p4.value=ms.start_time_type left join m_p_code p5 on p5.code_type='endTimeType' and p5.value=ms.end_time_type where a.org_no like '510%' and a.fc_cust_type='2' order by a.org_no,a.gc_no

title: 日常档案查询
sql: select a.org_no 单位编码,o1.`name` 单位名称,a.mr_sect_no 抄表段编号,sect.`name` 抄表段名称 ,a.cons_no 用户编号,a.cons_name 用户名称,p20.`name` 用户状态,p28.name 费控类型,p22.`name` 用电分类,p23.`name` 用电类别 ,a.contract_cap 合同容量,a.run_cap 运行容量 ,mp.mp_no 计量点编码,p21.`name` 计量点状态,cm.made_no 表号,cm.t_factor 综合倍率,p17.`name` 参考表 ,GROUP_CONCAT(p29.name SEPARATOR ',') 档案示数,p1.name 峰谷标志,p2.name 电表规范,consprc.prc_code 电价码,catprc.cat_prc_name 电价名称 from m_c_cons a join ac_org o1 on a.org_no=o1.id join m_c_sp c on a.id=c.cons_id join m_c_cons_prc_tactic e on c.id=e.sp_id join m_c_mp mp on c.id=mp.sp_id and mp.type_code='01' left join m_g_line mgline on mp.line_id=mgline.id left join m_g_tg mgtg on mp.tg_id=mgtg.id left join m_c_cons_prc consprc on mp.tariff_id=consprc.id left join m_e_cat_prc catprc on consprc.prc_code=catprc.prc_code and catprc.para_vn=f_get_curver_para_vn('1',@org_no) left join m_c_meter_mp_rela cmmr on mp.id=cmmr.mp_id left join m_c_meter cm on cmmr.meter_id=cm.id left join m_r_sect sect on a.mr_sect_no=sect.id left join ( select ta.cons_id,count(ta.id) zsl,sum(ta.plate_cap) zrl ,count(case when run_status_code='01' then ta.id end) zysl ,sum(case when run_status_code='01' then ta.plate_cap else 0 end) zyrl ,group_concat(distinct(case when run_status_code='01' then tp1.`name` else '' end)) bsjsfs from m_g_tran ta left join m_p_code tp1 on tp1.code_type='tlAlgCode' and tp1.`value`=ta.ts_alg_flag where ta.org_no like concat(@org_no,'%') and ta.cons_id is not null group by ta.cons_id ) t on a.id=t.cons_id left join m_c_meter_read re on re.meter_id=cm.id and mp.id=re.mp_id left join m_d_meter de on de.id=cm.id left join m_p_code p1 on p1.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p1.`value`=consprc.ts_flag left join m_p_code p2 on p2.code_type='cpuType' and p2.`value`=de.cpu_type left join m_p_code p17 on p17.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p17.`value`=cm.ref_meter_flag left join m_p_code p20 on p20.code_type='statusCode' and p20.`value`=a.status_code left join m_p_code p21 on p21.code_type='mpStatus' and p21.`value`=mp.status_code left join m_p_code p22 on p22.code_type='custSortCode' and p22.`value`=a.cons_sort_code left join m_p_code p23 on p23.code_type='elecTypeCode' and p23.`value`=a.elec_type_code left join m_p_code p24 on p24.code_type='elecTypeCode' and p24.`value`=consprc.elec_type_code left join m_p_code p25 on p25.code_type='tradeCode' and p25.`value`=a.trade_code left join m_p_code p26 on p26.code_type='tradeCode' and p26.`value`=consprc.trade_code left join m_p_code p27 on p27.code_type='pubPrivFlag' and p27.value=mgtg.pub_priv_flag left join m_p_code p28 on p28.code_type='ctlMode' and p28.value=a.ctl_mode left join m_p_code p29 on p29.code_type='readTypeCode' and p29.value=re.read_type_code where a.org_no like concat(@org_no,'%') and a.status_code<>'9' and a.cons_no in('010221024543') group by a.cons_no,mp.mp_no order by a.org_no

title: 权限查询
sql: select a.`code`,a.`name` from ac_role a join ac_role_resource b on a.id = b.role_id join ac_resource c on c.id = b.resource_id

title: 查询2-7月抄表电量连续为0
sql: select distinct o.name 供电单位,cons_no 用户编号,cons_name 用户名称,p2.name 用户状态,p1.name 用电类别,p3.name 供电电压, left(cons.build_date,10) 立户日期,2025年2到7月电量,2025年2到7月电费 from m_c_cons cons join ac_org o on cons.org_no=o.id and o.id like '5100108%'

title: 查询5-7月份发行电量电费信息
sql: select distinct o.name 供电单位,cons_no 用户编号,cons_name 用户名称,p2.name 用户状态,p1.name 用电类别,p3.name 供电电压, left(cons.build_date,10) 立户日期, 2025年8月电量,2025年8月电费 from m_c_cons cons join ac_org o on cons.org_no=o.id and o.id like '5100102%'

title: 查询在途流程
sql: SELECT a.app_no,a.process_instance_id,a.proc_def_key, a.business_code_name FROM cmo_todo_task a WHERE a.app_no='20260104107222' GROUP BY a.process_instance_id

title: 查询多月未抄表用户信息

title: 查询快照最近6个月算费电价
sql: SELECT a.org_no AS 单位编码, o.`name` AS 单位名称, a.cons_no AS 户号, a.cons_name AS 户名,

title: 查询快照最近6个月算费电价是否一致
sql: SELECT 单位编码, 单位名称, 户号, 户名, `1月电价`, `2月电价`, `3月电价`, `4月电价`, `5月电价`, `6月电价`, CASE WHEN base IS NULL THEN '一致'

title: 查询收费金额抵扣电费年月信息
sql: select (select name from ac_org where id=a.org_no) 单位,a.cons_no 户号,a.cons_name 户名,b.charge_ym 缴费月份,b.charge_date 缴费时间,b.rcv_amt 收费金额,c.prepay_amt 预收金额,d.this_rcved_amt 实收电费,d.this_penalty 实收违约金,d.rcvbl_ym 电费账期 from m_c_cons a join m_a_pay_flow b on a.cons_no=b.cons_no and charge_date>='2021-08-29 00:00:00' and charge_date<'2021-09-29 00:00:00' join m_a_prepay_flow c on b.id=c.charge_id left join m_a_rcved_flow d on b.id=d.charge_id where a.org_no like '5100120%' and ifnull(a.ctl_mode,'')<>'01' select (select name from ac_org where id=a.org_no) 单位,a.cons_no 户号,a.cons_name 户名,b.charge_ym 缴费月份,b.charge_date 缴费时间,b.rcv_amt 收费金额,c.prepay_amt 预收金额,d.this_rcved_amt 实收电费,d.this_penalty 实收违约金,d.rcvbl_ym 电费账期 from m_c_cons a join m_a_pay_flow b on a.cons_no=b.cons_no and charge_date>='2018-08-29 00:00:00' and charge_date<'2022-02-18 00:00:00' join m_a_prepay_flow c on b.id=c.charge_id left join m_a_rcved_flow d on b.id=d.charge_id where a.org_no like '5100120%' and ifnull(a.ctl_mode,'')<>'01' and a.cons_no in (012002000612,012002044198,)

title: 查询电价码有多少个用户执行
sql: select consprc.prc_code 电价码,count(distinct a.cons_no) from m_c_cons a join ac_org o1 on a.org_no=o1.id join m_c_sp c on a.id=c.cons_id join m_c_cons_prc_tactic e on c.id=e.sp_id join m_c_mp mp on c.id=mp.sp_id left join m_c_cons_prc consprc on mp.tariff_id=consprc.id where a.org_no like concat(@org_no,'%') and a.status_code<>'9' and mp.status_code in('01','02') GROUP BY consprc.prc_code

title: 查询销户存在运行表计
sql: select o1.name 单位名称,a.cons_no 用户编号,a.cons_name 用户名称,p21.name 用户状态,cm.made_no 表号,p22.name 表计状态 from m_c_cons a join ac_org o1 on a.org_no=o1.id join m_c_sp c on a.id=c.cons_id join m_c_mp mp on c.id=mp.sp_id and mp.type_code='01' join m_c_meter_mp_rela cmmr on mp.id=cmmr.mp_id join m_c_meter cm on cmmr.meter_id=cm.id join m_d_meter mt on mt.id=cm.id left join m_p_code p21 on p21.code_type='statuscode' and p21.`value`=a.status_code left join m_p_code p22 on p22.code_type='meterStatus' and p22.`value`=mt.cur_status_code where a.org_no like '5100102%' and a.status_code='9'

title: 欠费冻结查询
sql: SELECT consNo, ( IFNULL( rcvbl_amt, 0 ) + IFNULL( rcvedAmtAfter, 0 ) ) qf, (IFNULL( rcvbl_penalty, 0 ) + IFNULL( thisPenalty, 0 )) owePenalty, rcvblAmt, tPq, mrSectNo, mrSectName, lineNo, lineName, tgNo, tgName, consName, elecAddr, operatorNo, tel FROM ( ( SELECT marf.cons_no consNo, sum( IFNULL( marf.rcvbl_amt, 0 ) ) - sum( IFNULL( marf.rcved_amt, 0 ) ) AS rcvbl_amt, sum( IFNULL( marf.rcvbl_penalty, 0 ) ) - sum( IFNULL( marf.rcved_penalty, 0 ) ) AS rcvbl_penalty, sum(IFNULL(marf.rcvbl_amt, 0)) rcvblAmt, sum(IFNULL(marf.t_pq, 0)) tPq, a.mr_sect_no mrSectNo, sect.name mrSectName, mg.line_no lineNo, mg.line_name lineName, mt.tg_no tgNo, mt.tg_name tgName, a.cons_name consName, a.elec_addr elecAddr, oper.operator_no operatorNo, ( SELECT mobile FROM m_c_contact b, m_c_cons_contact_rela rela WHERE b.id = rela.contact_id AND rela.cons_id = a.id AND LENGTH(b.mobile) = 11 ORDER BY b.contact_prio LIMIT 1) tel FROM m_a_rcvbl_flow_arc marf LEFT JOIN m_c_cons a ON a.cons_no = marf.cons_no LEFT JOIN m_r_sect sect ON sect.id = a.mr_sect_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cons_id, line_id, tg_id FROM m_c_mp GROUP BY cons_id) m ON a.id = m.cons_id LEFT JOIN m_g_line mg ON mg.id = m.line_id LEFT JOIN m_g_tg mt ON mt.id = m.tg_id LEFT JOIN m_r_oper_activity oper ON oper.mr_sect_no = sect.id AND oper.act_code = '03' AND oper.effect_flag = '1' WHERE 1 = 1 AND marf.org_no LIKE concat('5100102', '%') AND marf.release_date <= REPLACE('2025-11-03', '-', '') GROUP BY marf.cons_no ) ma LEFT JOIN ( SELECT macf.cons_no, sum( IFNULL( macf.this_rcved_amt, 0 ) ) rcvedAmtAfter, sum( IFNULL( macf.this_penalty, 0 ) ) thisPenalty FROM m_a_rcved_flow macf LEFT JOIN m_c_cons a ON a.cons_no = macf.cons_no WHERE 1 = 1 AND macf.rcvbl_amt_id IN ( SELECT id FROM m_a_rcvbl_flow_arc WHERE release_date <= REPLACE('2025-11-03', '-', '')) AND macf.rcved_date > '2025-11-03' AND macf.rcvbl_ym <= SUBSTR(REPLACE('2025-11-03' , '-', ''), 1, 6) AND macf.org_no LIKE concat('5100102', '%') GROUP BY macf.cons_no ) mc ON ma.consNo = mc.cons_no ) HAVING qf != 0 UNION ALL SELECT consNo, ( IFNULL( rcvbl_amt, 0 ) + IFNULL( rcvedAmtAfter, 0 ) ) qf, (IFNULL( rcvbl_penalty, 0 ) + IFNULL( thisPenalty, 0 )) owePenalty, rcvblAmt, tPq, mrSectNo, mrSectName, lineNo, lineName, tgNo, tgName, consName, elecAddr, operatorNo, tel FROM ( ( SELECT marf.cons_no consNo, sum( IFNULL( marf.rcvbl_amt, 0 ) ) - sum( IFNULL( marf.rcved_amt, 0 ) ) AS rcvbl_amt, sum( IFNULL( marf.rcvbl_penalty, 0 ) ) - sum( IFNULL( marf.rcved_penalty, 0 ) ) AS rcvbl_penalty, sum(IFNULL(marf.rcvbl_amt, 0)) rcvblAmt, sum(IFNULL(marf.t_pq, 0)) tPq, a.mr_sect_no mrSectNo, sect.name mrSectName, mg.line_no lineNo, mg.line_name lineName, mt.tg_no tgNo, mt.tg_name tgName, a.cons_name consName, a.elec_addr elecAddr, oper.operator_no operatorNo, ( SELECT mobile FROM m_c_contact b, m_c_cons_contact_rela rela WHERE b.id = rela.contact_id AND rela.cons_id = a.id AND LENGTH(b.mobile) = 11 ORDER BY b.contact_prio LIMIT 1) tel FROM m_a_rcvbl_flow marf LEFT JOIN m_c_cons a ON a.cons_no = marf.cons_no LEFT JOIN m_r_sect sect ON sect.id = a.mr_sect_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cons_id, line_id, tg_id FROM m_c_mp GROUP BY cons_id) m ON a.id = m.cons_id LEFT JOIN m_g_line mg ON mg.id = m.line_id LEFT JOIN m_g_tg mt ON mt.id = m.tg_id LEFT JOIN m_r_oper_activity oper ON oper.mr_sect_no = sect.id AND oper.act_code = '03' AND oper.effect_flag = '1' WHERE 1 = 1 AND marf.org_no LIKE concat('5100102', '%') AND marf.release_date <= REPLACE('2025-11-03', '-', '') GROUP BY marf.cons_no ) ma LEFT JOIN ( SELECT macf.cons_no, sum( IFNULL( macf.this_rcved_amt, 0 ) ) rcvedAmtAfter, sum( IFNULL( macf.this_penalty, 0 ) ) thisPenalty FROM m_a_rcved_flow macf LEFT JOIN m_c_cons a ON a.cons_no = macf.cons_no WHERE 1 = 1 AND macf.rcvbl_amt_id IN ( SELECT id FROM m_a_rcvbl_flow WHERE release_date <= REPLACE('2025-11-03', '-', '')) AND macf.rcved_date > '2025-11-03' AND macf.rcvbl_ym <= SUBSTR(REPLACE('2025-11-03' , '-', ''), 1, 6) AND macf.org_no LIKE concat('5100102', '%') GROUP BY macf.cons_no ) mc ON ma.consNo = mc.cons_no ) HAVING qf != 0

title: 用户8月份抄表示数查询
sql: select (select name from ac_org where id=a.org_no limit 1) 单位名称, a.cons_no 用户编号, a.cons_name 用户名称, p1.`name` 用户分类, a.elec_addr 用电地址, b.mp_id 计量点编号, p2.`name` 计量点分类, b.made_no 出厂编号, a.ym 电费年月, date_format(b.this_ymd,'%Y-%m-%d') 抄表日期, (select name from m_p_code m where m.code_type ='readTypeCode' and m.value=b.read_type_code limit 1) 示数类型, b.last_mr_num 上次示数, b.this_read 本次示数, b.t_factor 综合倍率, b.last_mr_pq 上次抄见电量, b.this_read_pq 本次抄见电量, (select name from m_p_code cd where cd.code_type='mrModeCode' and cd.value=b.actual_mode limit 1) 抄表方式, (select name from m_p_code cd where cd.code_type='mrStatusCode' and value=b.mr_status_code limit 1) 抄表状态, tq.tg_name 台区名称, line.line_name 线路名称, a.mr_sect_no 抄表段编号, (select name from m_r_sect where id=a.mr_sect_no limit 1) 抄表段名称 from m_e_cons_snap_arc a join m_r_data_arc b on a.id=b.calc_id left join m_c_mp c on c.id=b.mp_id left join m_g_tg tq on tq.id=c.tg_id left join m_g_line line on line.id=c.line_id left join m_p_code p1 on p1.code_type='custSortCode' and p1.`value`=a.cons_sort_code left join m_p_code p2 on p2.code_type='mpSortCode' and p2.`value`=c.type_code where a.org_no like concat(5100102, '%') and a.ym=202601 and exists (select 1 from m_r_plan_arc where app_no=a.app_code and plan_status='10') and c.type_code='01' and b.read_type_code='12' order by a.org_no,a.cons_no,a.cons_name

title: 用户余额冻结新
sql: SELECT * FROM ( ( SELECT ac.name, sect.name mrSectName, sect.id mrSectNo, mg.line_no lineNo, mg.line_name lineName, mt.tg_no tgNo, mt.tg_name tgName, mcc.cons_no userNo, mcc.cons_name userName, mcc.ctl_mode ctlMode FROM m_c_cons mcc join ac_org ac on mcc.org_no=ac.id LEFT JOIN m_r_sect sect ON sect.id = mcc.mr_sect_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cons_id, line_id, tg_id FROM m_c_mp GROUP BY cons_id) m ON mcc.id = m.cons_id LEFT JOIN m_g_line mg ON mg.id = m.line_id LEFT JOIN m_g_tg mt ON mt.id = m.tg_id WHERE mcc.org_no IN ( SELECT a.id FROM ac_org a WHERE a.id_path LIKE ( SELECT CONCAT(ao.id_path, '%') FROM ac_org ao WHERE ao.id = '5100102' ) AND a.type = 0 AND a.level = 3) )mc LEFT JOIN ( SELECT consNo, IFNULL(prepay_bal, 0) - IFNULL(prepay_amt, 0) accountBalance FROM ( ( SELECT mab.cons_no consNo, mab.prepay_bal FROM m_a_acct_bal mab) c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT map.cons_no, sum(IFNULL(map.prepay_amt, 0)) prepay_amt FROM m_a_prepay_flow MAP WHERE map.prepay_date > "20260201" GROUP BY map.cons_no)d ON c.consNo = d.cons_no ) )md ON mc.userNo = md.consNo )

sql: select acname 供电所, mrSectName 抄表段名称, mrSectNo 抄表段编号, lineNo 线路编号, lineName 线路名称, tgNo 台区编号, tgName 台区名称, userNo 用户编号, userName 用户名称, (select name from m_p_code where code_type ='ctlMode' and value = ctlMode) 档案费控类型, accountBalance 预购余额 from ( ( select ac.`name` acname, sect.name mrSectName, sect.id mrSectNo, mg.line_no lineNo, mg.line_name lineName, mt.tg_no tgNo, mt.tg_name tgName, mcc.cons_no userNo, mcc.cons_name userName, mcc.ctl_mode ctlMode from m_c_cons mcc join ac_org ac on mcc.org_no=ac.id left join m_r_sect sect on sect.id = mcc.mr_sect_no left join ( select cons_id, line_id, tg_id from m_c_mp group by cons_id) m on mcc.id = m.cons_id left join m_g_line mg on mg.id = m.line_id left join m_g_tg mt on mt.id = m.tg_id where 1 = 1 and mcc.org_no like '510010233%'

title: 用户全量算费档案
sql: select a.org_no 单位编码,o1.`name` 单位名称,a.mr_sect_no 抄表段编号,sect.`name` 抄表段名称 ,a.cons_no 用户编号,a.cons_name 用户名称,p20.`name` 用户状态,p28.name 费控类型,p22.`name` 用电分类,p23.`name` 用电类别 ,p25.`name` 行业分类,p4.`name` 供电电压,a.contract_cap 合同容量,a.run_cap 运行容量 ,p1.`name` 定价策略类型,p2.`name` 基本电费计算方式,e.dmd_spec_value 核定值,p3.`name` 功率因数考核方式 ,mp.mp_no 计量点编码,p21.`name` 计量点状态,p27.name '公专变',mgtg.tg_no '台区编码',mgtg.tg_name '台区名称',mgline.line_no '线路编码', mgline.line_name '线路名称',cm.made_no 表号,cm.t_factor 综合倍率,p17.`name` 参考表 ,ifnull((select '是' from m_r_coll_obj where meter_id=cm.id),'否') 是否采集 ,p9.`name` 计量方式,p10.`name` 计量点性质,p11.`name` 电量计算方式,mp.fqr_value 定量定比值 ,p12.`name` 变损分摊标识,p13.`name` 变损计费标识,p14.`name` 线损计算方式,p15.`name` 线损分摊标识,p16.`name` 线损计费标识 ,consprc.prc_code 电价码,catprc.cat_prc_name 电价名称,p24.`name` 电价用电类别,p26.`name` 电价行业分类 ,p6.`name` 执行水期,p7.`name` 执行峰谷,p8.`name` 力调标准 ,t.zsl 变压器总数,t.zrl 变压器总容量,t.zysl 在运变压器数量,t.zyrl 在运变压器容量,t.bsjsfs 在运变压器变损计算方式 ,left(a.build_date,10) 立户日期,GROUP_CONCAT(p29.name SEPARATOR ',') 档案示数 from m_c_cons a join ac_org o1 on a.org_no=o1.id join m_c_sp c on a.id=c.cons_id join m_c_cons_prc_tactic e on c.id=e.sp_id join m_c_mp mp on c.id=mp.sp_id and mp.type_code='01' left join m_g_line mgline on mp.line_id=mgline.id left join m_g_tg mgtg on mp.tg_id=mgtg.id left join m_c_cons_prc consprc on mp.tariff_id=consprc.id left join m_e_cat_prc catprc on consprc.prc_code=catprc.prc_code and catprc.para_vn=f_get_curver_para_vn('1',@org_no) left join m_c_meter_mp_rela cmmr on mp.id=cmmr.mp_id left join m_c_meter cm on cmmr.meter_id=cm.id left join m_r_sect sect on a.mr_sect_no=sect.id left join ( select ta.cons_id,count(ta.id) zsl,sum(ta.plate_cap) zrl ,count(case when run_status_code='01' then ta.id end) zysl ,sum(case when run_status_code='01' then ta.plate_cap else 0 end) zyrl ,group_concat(distinct(case when run_status_code='01' then tp1.`name` else '' end)) bsjsfs from m_g_tran ta left join m_p_code tp1 on tp1.code_type='tlAlgCode' and tp1.`value`=ta.ts_alg_flag where ta.org_no like concat(@org_no,'%') and ta.cons_id is not null group by ta.cons_id ) t on a.id=t.cons_id left join m_c_meter_read re on re.meter_id=cm.id and mp.id=re.mp_id left join m_p_code p1 on p1.code_type='prcTacticType' and p1.`value`=e.type_code left join m_p_code p2 on p2.code_type='baCalcMode' and p2.`value`=e.ba_calc_mode left join m_p_code p3 on p3.code_type='pfEvalMode' and p3.`value`=e.pf_eval_mode left join m_p_code p4 on p4.code_type='psVoltCode' and p4.`value`=a.volt_code left join m_p_code p6 on p6.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p6.`value`=consprc.fe_flag left join m_p_code p7 on p7.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p7.`value`=consprc.ts_flag left join m_p_code p8 on p8.code_type='pfStdCode' and p8.`value`=consprc.pf_std_code left join m_p_code p9 on p9.code_type='measMode' and p9.`value`=mp.meas_mode left join m_p_code p10 on p10.code_type='mpAttrCode' and p10.`value`=mp.mp_attr_code left join m_p_code p11 on p11.code_type='calcMode' and p11.`value`=mp.calc_mode left join m_p_code p12 on p12.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p12.`value`=mp.tl_share_flag left join m_p_code p13 on p13.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p13.`value`=mp.tl_bill_flag left join m_p_code p14 on p14.code_type='llCalcMode' and p14.`value`=mp.ll_calc_mode left join m_p_code p15 on p15.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p15.`value`=mp.ll_share_flag left join m_p_code p16 on p16.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p16.`value`=mp.ll_bill_flag left join m_p_code p17 on p17.code_type='ynJudgeFlag' and p17.`value`=cm.ref_meter_flag left join m_p_code p20 on p20.code_type='statusCode' and p20.`value`=a.status_code left join m_p_code p21 on p21.code_type='mpStatus' and p21.`value`=mp.status_code left join m_p_code p22 on p22.code_type='custSortCode' and p22.`value`=a.cons_sort_code left join m_p_code p23 on p23.code_type='elecTypeCode' and p23.`value`=a.elec_type_code left join m_p_code p24 on p24.code_type='elecTypeCode' and p24.`value`=consprc.elec_type_code left join m_p_code p25 on p25.code_type='tradeCode' and p25.`value`=a.trade_code left join m_p_code p26 on p26.code_type='tradeCode' and p26.`value`=consprc.trade_code left join m_p_code p27 on p27.code_type='pubPrivFlag' and p27.value=mgtg.pub_priv_flag left join m_p_code p28 on p28.code_type='ctlMode' and p28.value=a.ctl_mode left join m_p_code p29 on p29.code_type='readTypeCode' and p29.value=re.read_type_code where a.org_no like concat(@org_no,'%') and a.status_code<>'9' group by a.cons_no,mp.mp_no order by a.org_no

title: 用户发行电量电费信息查询
sql: select a.org_no 单位编码,o.`name` 单位名称,a.cons_no 户号,a.cons_name 户名 ,p4.`name` 费控类型,p2.`name` `用电类别`,p3.name 电压等级,b.prc_code 电价编码,c.cat_prc_name 电价名称 ,sum(b.t_settle_pq) 电量,sum(t_amt) 电费 from m_e_cons_snap_arc a join m_e_cons_prc_amt_arc b on a.id=b.calc_id join ac_org o on a.org_no=o.id left join m_e_cat_prc c on b.para_vn=c.para_vn and b.prc_code=c.prc_code left join m_p_code p1 on p1.code_type='tradeCode' and p1.`value`=a.trade_type_code left join m_p_code p2 on p2.code_type='elecTypeCode' and p2.`value`=b.elec_type_code left join m_p_code p3 on p3.code_type='psVoltCode' and p3.`value`=a.volt_code left join m_p_code p4 on p4.code_type='ctlMode' and p4.`value`=a.ctl_mode where a.org_no like '5100102%' and a.ym=202601 group by a.cons_no,b.prc_code,a.ctl_mode

title: 用户和变压器时间查询
sql: select a.org_no 单位编码,o1.`name` 单位名称,a.cons_no 用户编号,a.cons_name 用户名称,p20.`name` 用户状态,p22.`name` 用电分类,p23.`name` 用电类别 ,p25.`name` 行业分类,a.contract_cap 合同容量,a.run_cap 运行容量 ,p1.`name` 定价策略类型,p2.`name` 基本电费计算方式,e.dmd_spec_value 核定值,p3.`name` 功率因数考核方式 ,t.id 变压器标识,t.tran_name 变压器名称,t.chg_remark 变压器状态,t.plate_cap 变压器容量,left(t.actual_start_date,10) 实际启用时间, left(t.actual_stop_use_date,10) 实际停用时间,ifnull(t.plan_resume_date,'') 设备恢复时间 ,left(a.build_date,10) 立户日期 from m_c_cons a join ac_org o1 on a.org_no=o1.id join m_c_sp c on a.id=c.cons_id join m_c_cons_prc_tactic e on c.id=e.sp_id left join m_g_tran t on a.id=t.cons_id left join m_p_code p1 on p1.code_type='prcTacticType' and p1.`value`=e.type_code left join m_p_code p2 on p2.code_type='baCalcMode' and p2.`value`=e.ba_calc_mode left join m_p_code p3 on p3.code_type='pfEvalMode' and p3.`value`=e.pf_eval_mode left join m_p_code p20 on p20.code_type='statusCode' and p20.`value`=a.status_code left join m_p_code p22 on p22.code_type='custSortCode' and p22.`value`=a.cons_sort_code left join m_p_code p23 on p23.code_type='elecTypeCode' and p23.`value`=a.elec_type_code left join m_p_code p25 on p25.code_type='tradeCode' and p25.`value`=a.trade_code where a.org_no like concat(@org_no,'%') and a.status_code<>'9' and a.contract_cap>=315 order by a.org_no

title: 界面发送短信查询
sql: SELECT ac.name 管理单位,cons.cons_no 户号,cons.cons_name 户名,mt.`name` 短信类别,CASE ms.send_status WHEN '00' THEN '发送成功' ELSE '发送失败' END 短信状态,ms.sms_phone 接收号码,ms.generate_time 生成时间,ms.send_time 发送时间,ms.sms_content 短信内容, user.user_name 发送人 FROM `m_c_cons` cons LEFT JOIN ac_org ac ON ac.id=cons.org_no LEFT JOIN m_st_sms_send_record ms ON ms.rela_id=cons.id LEFT JOIN m_st_message_template mt ON mt.`code`=ms.template_code LEFT JOIN ac_user `user` ON `user`.login_name=ms.create_user WHERE cons.org_no LIKE '5100102%' AND ms.generate_time BETWEEN '2025-01-01 00:00:00' AND '2026-01-01 00:00:00' AND mt.`code`='outageNotice' AND mt.org_no=510 AND ms.send_status='00'

title: 票据打印信息查询
sql: select e.rcvbl_amt_id 实体ID,f.note_no 票据号码,p1.`name` 票据类型,e.print_amt 打印金额,max(print_num) 打印次数,max(e.print_date) 打印时间,p2.`name` 打印状态 from m_a_inv_print_flow e left join m_a_inv f on e.note_id=f.id AND f.note_use_state='01' left join m_a_inv_ver g on f.ver_id=g.id LEFT JOIN m_p_code p1 ON p1.code_type='noteTypeCode' AND g.note_type_code=p1.`value` LEFT JOIN m_p_code p2 ON p2.code_type='noteUseState' AND f.note_use_state=p2.`value` where e.org_no LIKE '5100102%' AND e.print_date BETWEEN '2026-02-01 00:00:00' AND '2026-02-27 00:00:00' group by f.note_no,g.note_type_code,e.print_amt SELECT mx.票据类型,SUM(mx.print_amt) 合计金额 FROM ( select e.rcvbl_amt_id 实体ID,f.note_no 票据号码,p1.`name` 票据类型,e.print_amt print_amt,max(print_num) 打印次数,max(e.print_date) 打印时间,p2.`name` 打印状态 from m_a_inv_print_flow e left join m_a_inv f on e.note_id=f.id AND f.note_use_state='01' left join m_a_inv_ver g on f.ver_id=g.id LEFT JOIN m_p_code p1 ON p1.code_type='noteTypeCode' AND g.note_type_code=p1.`value` LEFT JOIN m_p_code p2 ON p2.code_type='noteUseState' AND f.note_use_state=p2.`value` where e.org_no LIKE '5100102%' AND e.print_date BETWEEN '2025-01-01 00:00:00' AND '2025-12-31 23:59:59' AND g.note_type_code IN ('0102','0101','02','06','09','10') group by f.note_no,g.note_type_code,e.print_amt ) AS mx GROUP BY mx.票据类型 SELECT p1.`name` 票据类型,SUM(fo.t_amt) FROM `m_a_note_info` fo LEFT JOIN m_p_code p1 ON p1.code_type='noteTypeCode' AND fo.note_type_code=p1.`value` WHERE fo.billing_date BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-12-31' AND fo.`status`='01' AND fo.org_no LIKE '5100102%' GROUP BY fo.note_type_code

sql: SELECT mp.mp_no '计量点编号', SUM(e_mp_pq.settle_apq) '电量', cons.cons_no '户号', cons.cons_name '户名', org.name '供电单位' FROM m_e_mp_para_snap_arc e_mp_para_snap, m_e_mp_pq_arc e_mp_pq,

title: 综合查询，市场化
sql: select * from ( select e.name 县公司,f.name 供电所,c.org_no 供电所编号,c.cons_no 用户编号,c.cons_name 用户名称,if(a.`status`=0,'已签订交易合同','已注册') 交易状态 ,d.mp_no 计量点编号,c.mr_sect_no 抄表段编号,s.`name` 抄表段名称,(select name from m_p_code p where p.code_type = 'mrSectAttr' and p.`value`= s.attr)抄表段属性,(select name from m_p_code p where p.code_type = 'calcMode' and p.`value`= d.calc_mode) 电量计算方式,b.effect_date 生效日期,b.expiry_date 失效日期,if(b.effect_ym is null or b.expiry_ym<={电费年月},'不参与','参与') 计量点当月是否参与交易 from m_c_market_userinfo a join m_c_mp_info b on a.id = b.market_user_id join m_c_cons c on b.cons_id = c.id join m_c_mp d on d.id = b.mp_id LEFT JOIN m_r_sect s on s.id= c.mr_sect_no left join ac_org e on e.code = SUBSTR(c.org_no,1,7) left join ac_org f on f.code = c.org_no where a.`status` in(0,2) and c.cons_no in(SELECT cons_no FROM m_c_market_actual_variety where `year` =left({电费年月},4) and `month` =right({电费年月},2) and cons_status=1) union all select e.name 县公司,f.name 供电所,c.org_no 供电所编号,c.cons_no 用户编号,c.cons_name 用户名称,if(a.`status`=0,'已签订交易合同','已注册') 交易状态,d.mp_no 计量点编号,c.mr_sect_no 抄表段编号,s.`name` 抄表段名称,(select name from m_p_code p where p.code_type = 'mrSectAttr' and p.`value`= s.attr)抄表段属性,(select name from m_p_code p where p.code_type = 'calcMode' and p.`value`= d.calc_mode) 电量计算方式,b.effect_date 生效日期,b.expiry_date 失效日期,'不参与' 计量点当月是否参与交易 from m_c_market_userinfo a join m_c_mp_info b on a.id = b.market_user_id join m_c_cons c on b.cons_id = c.id join m_c_mp d on d.id = b.mp_id LEFT JOIN m_r_sect s on s.id= c.mr_sect_no left join ac_org e on e.code = SUBSTR(c.org_no,1,7) left join ac_org f on f.code = c.org_no where a.`status` in(0,2) and c.cons_no not in(SELECT cons_no FROM m_c_market_actual_variety where `year` =left({电费年月},4) and `month` =right({电费年月},2) and cons_status=1) )a where 供电所编号 like concat({组织},'%') and 计量点当月是否参与交易 like concat({是否参与交易},'%') ORDER BY 1,2,3,4,5

title: 计量点无级别数
sql: SELECT o1.name 供电所,a.cons_no 户号,mp.mp_no 计量点编号,mp.mp_name 计量点名称,p1.name 电费计算方式,mp.mp_level from m_c_cons a join ac_org o1 on a.org_no=o1.id join m_c_sp c on a.id=c.cons_id join m_c_cons_prc_tactic e on c.id=e.sp_id join m_c_mp mp on c.id=mp.sp_id and mp.type_code='01' left join m_p_code p1 on p1.code_type='calcMode' and p1.`value`=mp.calc_mode WHERE mp.mp_level IS NULL

title: 证件信息查询
sql: select ac.name 供电单位,a.cons_no 电网户号,a.cons_name 户名,a.elec_addr 地址,p2.`name` 证件类型,c.cert_no 证件号码,left(a.build_date,10) 开户日期,GROUP_CONCAT(ct.mobile)联系方式 ,p1.`name` 用电类型 from m_c_cons a join ac_org ac on ac.id=a.org_no left join m_c_cons_cert_rela b on a.id=b.cons_id left join m_c_cert c on b.cert_id=c.id left join m_c_cons_contact_rela bc on a.id=bc.cons_id left join m_c_contact ct on bc.contact_id=ct.id left join m_p_code p1 on p1.code_type='elecTypeCode' and p1.`value`=a.elec_type_code left join m_p_code p2 on p2.code_type='certType' and p2.`value`=c.cert_type_code where a.org_no like '5100102%' group by a.cons_no,c.id order by a.cons_no

title: 证件及联系方式查询
sql: select ac.name 供电单位,a.cons_no 电网户号,a.cons_name 户名,a.elec_addr 地址,p2.`name` 证件类型,c.cert_no 证件号码,left(a.build_date,10) 开户日期,GROUP_CONCAT(ct.mobile)联系方式 ,p1.`name` 用电类型 from m_c_cons a join ac_org ac on ac.id=a.org_no left join m_c_cons_cert_rela b on a.id=b.cons_id left join m_c_cert c on b.cert_id=c.id left join m_c_cons_contact_rela bc on a.id=bc.cons_id left join m_c_contact ct on bc.contact_id=ct.id left join m_p_code p1 on p1.code_type='elecTypeCode' and p1.`value`=a.elec_type_code left join m_p_code p2 on p2.code_type='certType' and p2.`value`=c.cert_type_code where a.org_no like '5100102%' group by a.cons_no,c.id order by a.cons_no

title: 账期时间查询
sql: select ac.`name`,sy.`value`,DATE_FORMAT(sy.effect_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') 生效时间, DATE_FORMAT(ifnull(sy.expire_time,''), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') 失效时间 from m_p_syspara_value sy LEFT JOIN ac_org ac ON ac.`code`=sy.org_no where sy.para_id in (select id from m_p_syspara where para_code = 'AMTYM') and sy.org_no='5100102' and sy.`value` BETWEEN 202401 AND 202503 GROUP BY sy.`value`

title: 购电侧上网汇总
sql: SELECT (SELECT name FROM ac_org WHERE id = amt.org_no) 管理单位, amt.年月, amt.发电厂编号, amt.发电厂名称, amt.企业编号, amt.企业名称, amt.抄见有功电量, amt.线损电量, amt.拒购电量, amt.过网电量, amt.结算有效电量, amt.网内收购电量, amt.网内收购电费, amt.网外代销电量, amt.网外代销电费, amt.无功考核电量, amt.超欠发无功电费, amt.税费, amt.税后电费, amt.应付电费, amt.应收过网费, amt.发电电量, amt.上网电量, if(amt.发电电量=0,0,round((amt.发电电量-amt.上网电量)/amt.发电电量,2)) 厂用率 FROM (SELECT amt.*, IFNULL((SELECT sum(q.settle_apq) FROM m_e_mp_pq_arc q LEFT JOIN m_e_mp_para_snap_arc p ON p.id = q.mp_para_snap_id AND p.usage_type_code = '1101' WHERE p.calc_id = amt.id),0) 发电电量, IFNULL((SELECT sum(q.settle_apq) FROM m_e_mp_pq_arc q LEFT JOIN m_e_mp_para_snap_arc p ON p.id = q.mp_para_snap_id AND p.usage_type_code = '1102' WHERE p.calc_id = amt.id),0) 上网电量 FROM (SELECT t.id,t.org_no, t.年月, t.发电厂编号, t.发电厂名称, t.企业编号, t.企业名称, t.抄见有功电量, t.线损电量, t.拒购电量, t.过网电量, SUM(if(b.amt_type='200' or b.amt_type='201',IFNULL(b.T_SETTLE_PQ, 0),0)) 结算有效电量, SUM(if(b.amt_type='201',IFNULL(b.T_SETTLE_PQ, 0),0)) 网内收购电量, SUM(if(b.amt_type='201',IFNULL(b.T_AMT, 0),0)) 网内收购电费, SUM(if(b.amt_type='200',IFNULL(b.T_SETTLE_PQ, 0),0)) 网外代销电量, SUM(if(b.amt_type='200',IFNULL(b.T_AMT, 0),0)) 网外代销电费, t.无功考核电量, SUM(if(b.amt_type='204',IFNULL(b.T_AMT, 0),0)) 超欠发无功电费, round(SUM(if(b.amt_type='200' or b.amt_type='201' or b.amt_type='204',IFNULL(b.T_AMT, 0),0)) -round(SUM(if(b.amt_type='200' or b.amt_type='201' or b.amt_type='204', IFNULL(b.T_AMT, 0),0)) / (1+ifnull(c.value_added_tax,0)),2),2) 税费, round(SUM(if(b.amt_type='200' or b.amt_type='201' or b.amt_type='204', IFNULL(b.T_AMT, 0),0)) / (1+ifnull(c.value_added_tax,0)),2) 税后电费, SUM(if(b.amt_type='200' or b.amt_type='201' or b.amt_type='204',IFNULL(b.T_AMT, 0),0)) 应付电费, SUM(if(b.amt_type='202',IFNULL(b.T_AMT, 0),0)) 应收过网费 FROM ( SELECT c.id, c.gc_id, c.org_no, a.amt_ym 年月, c.gc_no 发电厂编号, c.gc_name 发电厂名称, d.geg_no 企业编号, d.geg_name 企业名称, sum(ifnull(mp.flaten_apq,0)) 抄见有功电量, sum(ifnull(mp.ap_ll,0)) 线损电量, sum(ifnull(mp.rfspuh_share_pq,0)) 拒购电量, sum(ifnull(mp.ssu_pq,0)) 过网电量, sum(ifnull(mp.check_rp,0)) 无功考核电量 FROM m_r_plan_arc a INNER JOIN m_r_sect b ON a.mr_sect_no = b.id AND b.attr='23' INNER JOIN m_e_gc_snap_arc c ON a.app_no = c.app_code INNER JOIN m_c_fc_geg_gc_rela rela ON rela.gc_id = c.gc_id inner join m_c_fc_geg d on d.id = rela.geg_id INNER JOIN m_e_mp_para_snap_arc e ON c.id = e.calc_id AND e.data_src not in ('99','98') left JOIN m_e_fc_mp_pq_det_arc mp ON mp.mp_para_snap_id = e.id where c.ym BETWEEN 202401 and 202412 c.org_no like '5100434%' GROUP BY c.id) t INNER JOIN m_e_cons_prc_amt_arc b ON t.ID = b.CALC_ID inner JOIN m_c_fc_gc c ON t.gc_id = c.id GROUP BY t.id) amt) amt

title: 资中代征
sql:
select distinct o.name 单位,subs_no 变电站编号,subs_name 变电站名称,p1.name 电压等级,p2.name 运行状态,mt_num 主变台数,mt_cap 主变容量,subs_addr 变电站地址
from m_g_subs a 
join ac_org o on a.org_no=o.id and o.id like concat(@org,'%') 
left join m_p_code p1 on p1.take_effect_flag=1 and p1.code_type='psVoltCode' and p1.value=a.volt_code 
left join m_p_code p2 on p2.take_effect_flag=1 and p2.code_type='runStatusCode' and p2.value=a.run_status_code

title: 资中代征
sql:
select distinct o.name 单位,subs_no 变电站编号,subs_name 变电站名称,line_no 线路编号,line_name 线路名称,p1.name 线路电压,p2.name 线路状态,wire_len 导线长度
from m_g_line a 
join ac_org o on a.org_no=o.id and o.id like concat(@org,'%') 
left join m_g_subs_line_rela b on a.id=b.line_id 
left join m_g_subs c on b.subs_id=c.id 
left join m_p_code p1 on p1.take_effect_flag=1 and p1.code_type='psVoltCode' and p1.value=a.volt_code 
left join m_p_code p2 on p2.take_effect_flag=1 and p2.code_type='runStatusCode' and p2.value=a.run_status_code

title: 资中代征
sql:
select distinct o.name 单位,line_no 线路编号,line_name 线路名称,tg_no 台区编号,tg_name 台区名称,p2.name 台区状态,p3.name 公专变标志,tg_cap 容量,a.inst_addr 安装地址
from m_g_tg a 
join ac_org o on a.org_no=o.id and o.id like concat(@org,'%') 
left join m_g_line_tg_rela c on a.id=c.tg_id and rela_flag=1 
left join m_g_line d on c.line_id=d.id 
left join m_p_code p2 on p2.take_effect_flag=1 and p2.code_type='runStatusCode' and p2.value=a.run_status_code 
left join m_p_code p3 on p3.take_effect_flag=1 and p3.code_type='pubprivflag' and p3.value=a.pub_priv_flag

title: 资中代征
sql:
select o.name 单位,tg_no 台区编号,tg_name 台区名称,made_no 变压器编号,tran_name 变压器名称,p1.name 变压器型号,p2.name 变压器状态,p3.name 公专变标识,
p4.name 主备性质,plate_cap 变压器铭牌容量,p9.name 设备类型,p11.name 变压器类型,inst_date 安装日期,frst_run_date 设备首次运行的日期,actual_start_date 实际启用日期,
actual_stop_use_date 实际停用日期,plan_resume_date 计划恢复日期,p5.name 低压中性点是否接地,p6.name 一次侧电压,p7.name 二次侧电压,p8.name 产权,
rp_tl_value 无功变损协议值,ap_tl_value 有功变损协议值,ts_no 变损编号,p10.name 变损计算方式
from m_G_tran a 
join ac_org o on a.org_no=o.id and o.id like concat(@org,'%') 
left join m_g_tg c on c.id=a.tg_id 
left join m_p_code p1 on p1.take_effect_flag=1 and p1.code_type='tranModelNo' and p1.value=a.model_no 
left join m_p_code p2 on p2.take_effect_flag=1 and p2.code_type='runStatusCode' and p2.value=a.run_status_code 
left join m_p_code p3 on p3.take_effect_flag=1 and p3.code_type='pubprivflag' and p3.value=a.pub_priv_flag 
left join m_p_code p4 on p4.take_effect_flag=1 and p4.code_type='msFlag' and p4.value=a.ms_Flag 
left join m_p_code p5 on p5.take_effect_flag=1 and p5.code_type='groundMode' and p5.value=a.ground_flag 
left join m_p_code p6 on p6.take_effect_flag=1 and p6.code_type='psVoltCode' and p6.value=a.frstside_volt_code 
left join m_p_code p7 on p7.take_effect_flag=1 and p7.code_type='psVoltCode' and p7.value=a.sndside_volt_code
left join m_p_code p8 on p8.take_effect_flag=1 and p8.code_type='propertyRight' and p8.value=a.pr_code 
left join m_p_code p9 on p9.take_effect_flag=1 and p9.code_type='equipTypeCode' and p9.value=a.type_code 
left join m_p_code p10 on p10.take_effect_flag=1 and p10.code_type='tlAlgCode' and p10.value=a.ts_alg_flag 
left join m_p_code p11 on p11.take_effect_flag=1 and p11.code_type='tranTypeCode' and p11.value=a.tran_type

title: 资中代征
sql:
select a.prc_code 电价编号,a.cat_prc_name 电价名称,(select name from m_p_code where code_type='prcVoltCode' and value=a.prc_volt_code) 电价电压等级,(select name from m_p_code where code_type='elecTypeCode' and value=a.elec_type_code) 用电类别,e.cap_prc 容量单价,e.dmd_prc 需量单价,平平,平尖,平峰,平谷,丰平,丰尖,丰峰,丰谷,枯平,枯尖,枯峰,枯谷,c.第一阶梯止度,d.第一阶梯单价,c.第二阶梯止度,d.第二阶梯单价,c.第三阶梯止度,d.第三阶梯单价,add1 '农网还贷(10000)',add2 '水利基金(20000)',add3 '库区移民基金(30000)',add4 '可再生能源(40000)'
,省级代理购电价代码,省级代理购电价名称,`代理购电价(尖)`,`代理购电价(峰)`,`代理购电价(平)`,`代理购电价(谷)`,`输配电价(尖)`,`输配电价(峰)`,`输配电价(平)`,`输配电价(谷)`,其中居民损益折合度,其中代理偏差折合度,平均电价差额
from m_e_cat_prc a 
left join (
SELECT cat_prc_id,
SUM(CASE WHEN range_type_code in ('31-13','13') and prc_ti_code='03' THEN cat_kwh_prc ELSE 0 END) as '平平',
SUM(CASE WHEN range_type_code in ('31-13','13') and prc_ti_code='01' THEN cat_kwh_prc ELSE 0 END) as '平尖',
SUM(CASE WHEN range_type_code in ('31-13','13') and prc_ti_code='02' THEN cat_kwh_prc ELSE 0 END) as '平峰',
SUM(CASE WHEN range_type_code in ('31-13','13') and prc_ti_code='04' THEN cat_kwh_prc ELSE 0 END) as '平谷',
SUM(CASE WHEN range_type_code in ('31-11','11') and prc_ti_code='03' THEN cat_kwh_prc ELSE 0 END) as '丰平',
SUM(CASE WHEN range_type_code in ('31-11','11') and prc_ti_code='01' THEN cat_kwh_prc ELSE 0 END) as '丰尖',
SUM(CASE WHEN range_type_code in ('31-11','11') and prc_ti_code='02' THEN cat_kwh_prc ELSE 0 END) as '丰峰',
SUM(CASE WHEN range_type_code in ('31-11','11') and prc_ti_code='04' THEN cat_kwh_prc ELSE 0 END) as '丰谷',
SUM(CASE WHEN range_type_code in ('31-12','12') and prc_ti_code='03' THEN cat_kwh_prc ELSE 0 END) as '枯平',
SUM(CASE WHEN range_type_code in ('31-12','12') and prc_ti_code='01' THEN cat_kwh_prc ELSE 0 END) as '枯尖',
SUM(CASE WHEN range_type_code in ('31-12','12') and prc_ti_code='02' THEN cat_kwh_prc ELSE 0 END) as '枯峰',
SUM(CASE WHEN range_type_code in ('31-12','12') and prc_ti_code='04' THEN cat_kwh_prc ELSE 0 END) as '枯谷'
FROM m_e_cat_prc_det 
GROUP BY cat_prc_id
) b on a.id=b.cat_prc_id
left join
(
select cat_prc_id
,max(ifnull((case range_type_code when '31-12' then end_value end),'')) 第一阶梯止度
,max(ifnull((case range_type_code when '32-12' then end_value end),'')) 第二阶梯止度
,max(ifnull((case range_type_code when '33-12' then end_value end),'')) 第三阶梯止度
from m_e_prc_scope where policy_type_code='33' group by cat_prc_id
) c on a.id=c.cat_prc_id
left join
(
select cat_prc_id
,max(ifnull((case when range_type_code in('31-11','31-12','31-13') then 0 end),'')) 第一阶梯单价
,max(ifnull((case when range_type_code in('32-11','32-12','32-13') then cat_kwh_prc end),'')) 第二阶梯单价
,max(ifnull((case when range_type_code in('33-11','33-12','33-13') then cat_kwh_prc end),'')) 第三阶梯单价
from m_e_cat_prc_det where range_type_code in ('31-11','31-12','31-13','32-11','32-12','32-13','33-11','33-12','33-13') group by cat_prc_id
) d on a.id=d.cat_prc_id
left join m_e_base_prc e on a.id=e.cat_prc_id 
left join
(
select cat_prc_id
,max(ifnull((case when pl_code in('10000') then pl_prc end),'')) add1
,max(ifnull((case when pl_code in('20000') then pl_prc end),'')) add2
,max(ifnull((case when pl_code in('30000') then pl_prc end),'')) add3
,max(ifnull((case when pl_code in('40000') then pl_prc end),'')) add4
from m_e_add_pl_prc f1
join m_e_cat_prc_det f2 on f1.det_id=f2.id
 group by cat_prc_id
) f on a.id=f.cat_prc_id
left join (
select c.id cat_prc_id,a.agent_code 省级代理购电价代码,a.agent_name 省级代理购电价名称
,SUM(CASE WHEN range_type_code in ('31-13','13') and prc_ti_code='03' THEN b.agent_prc ELSE 0 END) as '代理购电价(平)'
,SUM(CASE WHEN range_type_code in ('31-13','13') and prc_ti_code='01' THEN b.agent_prc ELSE 0 END) as '代理购电价(尖)'
,SUM(CASE WHEN range_type_code in ('31-13','13') and prc_ti_code='02' THEN b.agent_prc ELSE 0 END) as '代理购电价(峰)'
,SUM(CASE WHEN range_type_code in ('31-13','13') and prc_ti_code='04' THEN b.agent_prc ELSE 0 END) as '代理购电价(谷)'
,SUM(CASE WHEN range_type_code in ('31-13','13') and prc_ti_code='03' THEN b.trans_dist_prc ELSE 0 END) as '输配电价(平)'
,SUM(CASE WHEN range_type_code in ('31-13','13') and prc_ti_code='01' THEN b.trans_dist_prc ELSE 0 END) as '输配电价(尖)'
,SUM(CASE WHEN range_type_code in ('31-13','13') and prc_ti_code='02' THEN b.trans_dist_prc ELSE 0 END) as '输配电价(峰)'
,SUM(CASE WHEN range_type_code in ('31-13','13') and prc_ti_code='04' THEN b.trans_dist_prc ELSE 0 END) as '输配电价(谷)'
,b.agent_gain_prc 其中居民损益折合度,b.agent_offset_prc 其中代理偏差折合度,b.content1 平均电价差额
from m_e_agent_items a
join m_e_cat_prc_det_items b on a.id=b.agent_items_id
join m_e_cat_prc c on b.prc_id=c.id
join m_e_cat_prc_det d on b.det_id=d.id and c.id=d.cat_prc_id
group by c.id,a.agent_code,a.agent_name,b.agent_gain_prc,b.agent_offset_prc,b.content1
) g on a.id=g.cat_prc_id
where a.org_no like concat(@org,'%')
and para_vn=f_get_curver_para_vn(1, @org)
set @org:='5100434'

title: 资中代征
sql:
select o.name 单位,a.id 抄表段编号,a.name 抄表段名称,p1.name 抄表事件类型,p2.name 抄表方式,mr_day 抄表例日,p3.name 抄表周期,latest_mr_mon 上次抄表月份,
数据准备员,抄表员,复核员,电费计算员,电费审核发行员,收费员
from m_r_sect a 
join ac_org o on a.org_no=o.id 
join m_r_plan_day b on a.id=b.mr_sect_no and b.effect_flag=1 
left join (select mr_sect_no
,max(case when act_code='00' then operator_no end) 计划制定员
,max(case when act_code='01' then operator_no end) 数据准备员
,max(case when act_code='03' then operator_no end) 抄表员
,max(case when act_code='05' then operator_no end) 复核员
,max(case when act_code='07' then operator_no end) 电费计算员
,max(case when act_code='08' then operator_no end) 电费审核发行员
,max(case when act_code='21' then operator_no end) 收费员
from m_r_oper_activity group by mr_sect_no) c on a.id=c.mr_sect_no 
left join m_p_code p1 on p1.take_effect_flag=1 and p1.code_type='mrEventType' and p1.value=b.event_type 
left join m_p_code p2 on p2.take_effect_flag=1 and p2.code_type='mrmodecode' and p2.value=b.mr_mode_code 
left join m_p_code p3 on p3.take_effect_flag=1 and p3.code_type='periodcode' and p3.value=b.period_code 
where a.org_no like concat(@org,'%') and a.effect_flag=1
order by 单位,抄表段编号
set @org:='5100434'

title: 资中代征
sql:
select
o.name 供电单位,a.mr_sect_no 抄表段编号,e.name 抄表段名称,a.cons_no 用户编号,a.cons_name 用户名称,b.cust_no 客户编号,b.name 客户名称,a.elec_addr 用电地址,
a.build_date 立户日期,a.contract_cap 合同容量,p1.name 用户状态,a.run_cap 运行容量,p2.name 用户分类,p3.name 用电类别,p4.name 负荷性质,p5.name 供电电压,
p6.name 行业分类,p7.name 生产班次,p8.name 电费结算方式,p9.name 电费通知方式,p10.name 临时用电标志,a.tmp_date 临时用电到期日期,p11.name 票据类型,
c.vat_no 增值税号,c.vat_name 增值税名,c.bank_code 增值税银行,c.vat_acct 增值账号,c.reg_addr 注册地址,a.ps_date 送电日期,p12.name 缴费方式,
p13.name 重要性等级,p14.name 高耗能行业类别,p15.name 费控分类,p16.name 转供标志,p17.name 城农网标志,p18.name 企业规模,p19.name 临时用电用户分类,
b.social_credit_code 统一社会信用代码
from m_c_cons a 
join ac_org o on a.org_no=o.id and o.id like concat(@org,'%') 
left join m_c_cust b on a.cust_id=b.id 
left join m_c_vat c on a.vat_id=c.id 
left join m_c_acct d on a.id=d.cons_id 
left join m_r_sect e on a.mr_sect_no=e.id 
left join m_p_code p1 on p1.take_effect_flag=1 and p1.code_type='StatusCode' and p1.value=a.status_code 
left join m_p_code p2 on p2.take_effect_flag=1 and p2.code_type='custSortCode' and p2.value=a.cons_sort_code 
left join m_p_code p3 on p3.take_effect_flag=1 and p3.code_type='electypecode' and p3.value=a.elec_type_code 
left join m_p_code p4 on p4.take_effect_flag=1 and p4.code_type='lodeattrcode' and p4.value=a.lode_attr_code 
left join m_p_code p5 on p5.take_effect_flag=1 and p5.code_type='psvoltcode' and p5.value=a.volt_code 
left join m_p_code p6 on p6.take_effect_flag=1 and p6.code_type='tradecode' and p6.value=a.trade_code 
left join m_p_code p7 on p7.take_effect_flag=1 and p7.code_type='shiftno' and p7.value=a.shift_no 
left join m_p_code p8 on p8.take_effect_flag=1 and p8.code_type='feeSettleMode' and p8.value=a.settle_mode 
left join m_p_code p9 on p9.take_effect_flag=1 and p9.code_type='notifymode' and p9.value=a.notify_mode 
left join m_p_code p10 on p10.take_effect_flag=1 and p10.code_type='tmpFlag' and p10.value=a.tmp_flag 
left join m_p_code p11 on p11.take_effect_flag=1 and p11.code_type='notetypecode' and p11.value=a.note_type_code 
left join m_p_code p12 on p12.take_effect_flag=1 and p12.code_type='paymode' and p12.value=d.pay_mode 
left join m_p_code p13 on p13.take_effect_flag=1 and p13.code_type='rriocode' and p13.value=a.rrio_code 
left join m_p_code p14 on p14.take_effect_flag=1 and p14.code_type='hecindustrycode' and p14.value=a.hec_industry_code 
left join m_p_code p15 on p15.take_effect_flag=1 and p15.code_type='ctlmode' and p15.value=a.ctl_mode 
left join m_p_code p16 on p16.take_effect_flag=1 and p16.code_type='transferFlag' and p16.value=a.transfer_code 
left join m_p_code p17 on p17.take_effect_flag=1 and p17.code_type='ruralconscode' and p17.value=a.rural_cons_code 
left join m_p_code p18 on p18.take_effect_flag=1 and p18.code_type='busiscale' and p18.value=a.busi_scale 
left join m_p_code p19 on p19.take_effect_flag=1 and p19.code_type='tmpTradeCode' and p19.value=a.tmp_trade_code 
order by 供电单位,用户编号
